name: Leah Vukmir
subject: fired up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate
body:
Tammy Baldwin and her extreme left allies are using every smear tactic and despicable trick in an attempt to silence us, beat us and obstruct.....

Friend,

Tammy Baldwin and her extreme left allies are using every smear tactic and despicable trick in an attempt to silence us, beat us and obstruct reforms that will help the American middle class. They will stop at nothing. They'll even use politically motivated smear tactics to prevent a vote on Judge Kavanaugh’s nomination.

Wisconsinites want leaders who follow through on their promises and get results — not ones who obstruct the will of the people. Tammy Baldwin has lied and distorted my record to cover up her failures at the Tomah VA. It’s disgusting, and friend, I’m fed up.

[I AGREE: STOP TAMMY BALDWIN](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=kqVmlG-YfsRAtPRputOG3EaNsof_36ZSGR0OThfaNfyMMo4GohmVGpbETqc2rvL9jnK7J5JSVpAqbwfytSqOmIEj-C6VhwYO5uJmBNHuojLds4CRFwcbsAEahsqOzlJG-kcEm5T8bDqMMZOUjNOybIs35bRkoOQNHZlaLrSrLumqd7J9VubAzo9OGDbwwYOHsfl-Gxq-BgBPRj50pOa7n2nhUur2Iw92zYs9op3wR6N5JJkDwfd_C3hPVB34FOWdiJ20j3XRQ5G5JdyilfKZGldKvmMGUZD9GbinFEPnHDOvzc1Q8wOr5gpTowO2XXEVzNDEaltd_IOT6urqSaYhO0Twny_PZN8oxASChi4DSZZq4wl_NsdxS-NPqxKXLaIeWGDpsD_nxbEkQzwr2VrQoSmaR13UsHe6l9r_pHcWP84%3D)
---

Wisconsinites deserve better than Tammy Baldwin’s lies and her ineffective socialist solutions. They deserve access to the best healthcare. Those with pre-existing conditions shouldn’t have to tolerate low-quality, government-run health care, which will bankrupt our country.

I’ve been through the fires with the people of Wisconsin as Democrats unleashed hell to prevent good governance in Wisconsin. Now is the time for the silent majority and our leaders to have the backbone and once again say enough is enough. Middle-class tax cuts, the Constitution and Wisconsin decency are all on the ballot in the Senate race.

**[The time is now, friend. We must get fired up.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=kqVmlG-YfsRAtPRputOG3EaNsof_36ZSGR0OThfaNfyMMo4GohmVGpbETqc2rvL9jnK7J5JSVpAqbwfytSqOmIEj-C6VhwYO5uJmBNHuojLds4CRFwcbsAEahsqOzlJG-kcEm5T8bDqMMZOUjNOybIs35bRkoOQNHZlaLrSrLumqd7J9VubAzo9OGDbwwYOH7vy0Fojmjvn1fO_IYbpycLT-TeGH35QCiFU-SalIGWpe5Youl1e4cbmFDsbFYhD-_DVulIg4g9Os892fLPkwlA-LPNGeUm56ttLDwFqiHkUq59bICTZcvi3frJZzKTj1ND0v7xW5RocSDO6MExpZ4Bm1jOiivk2TlgtpYyiCx-WdIeRj1FGoa_4nkCILME6rnGtLoGmAEUZQXKxLIsw76HKkepFBNymbWX6Gd5nV3Ks%3D) **We must fight. People are already early voting in this election, and so much is at stake.
[JOIN LEAH](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=kqVmlG-YfsRAtPRputOG3EaNsof_36ZSGR0OThfaNfyMMo4GohmVGpbETqc2rvL9jnK7J5JSVpAqbwfytSqOmIEj-C6VhwYO5uJmBNHuojLds4CRFwcbsAEahsqOzlJG-kcEm5T8bDqMMZOUjNOybIs35bRkoOQNHZlaLrSrLumqd7J9VubAzo9OGDbwwYOH-ODqnl0_fd-Ygwb_2x14eapdwOAUDQX-8Ne7OUuPz4fuetxnhbjZRFKU0HW576c2K0L0Tp9RCDx1FGIkldMgc8CdaaxdBtuYZA99itlXH1IGtFn8CyUJYxkEvyauWUGlf-CQoKvgvdZgHApCbJJJIc7RY_ndRitGJSrGfdvzoAc6Ckevye40Q-M5e1s_XURZ2S0zFZv3rSFU2FG0rIuYgF1DZj4CTsejiMivu6WSkCE%3D)
---

We need all hands on deck to make certain we can continue moving Wisconsin — and our nation — in the right direction.

-Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=kqVmlG-YfsRAtPRputOG3AOi6Xfl4MuRmglqvhlq4myD9e8QutXEPMuCUL9bVx8hqUmoJZNi5BPZ3Yhzzq8CDIIS850t6CJ0lDww--MfgetQI3fOdaAjKe4vpJzSu24geIJZsIcGqMvqQ-7wYB6z7Rij0B00Ed7f3gGNOdj0KnpX34XYUR3hZv3pLyiu9cm744fm5Payww38nSx21z1k4Qkut6Y8hWCQCPug1kfYWKkrY3HCej8Zbn_gXA2_g98UxuJeyA0scJ6ijVYOODnX4w%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=kqVmlG-YfsRAtPRputOG3Mwp9cEEMPq49lEvH2YoxZUGYeKEx-LmhePK8YIC34LmE7dAmskqy_2tPvgjDdzy7xYWc1JNVqAdDISwPGb1S4N1i_aTMSR-AYp05FZfelJLb4l3xxIaVUR0cIiFbyaWR4OOKtNwCMB7L8XfMq0yp6f-mQF8007HpfcQS5H_1an8-w1YNmDilrKGAb-0fWVYvO7MQNG1Rn2exKL086OmwefdkaILyIXxb7jQGOsmy0n6R34IJik4KWUleNBHWgldTQ%3D%3D)

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=Nwc0W_9dWznsh2Rbjxn_ZmY9Qtw5BgSQFC0DG1H6SmWRVWazRS91f-_m3w98pzh_2-w5wdtaJnKha3cQyA3o5vVvEJ5jFg-aDKIzIXgrnUDQL5JoZyv25XcFSY36PjOV9WM6vu1Fah3hbdBToUhsJSe9FQyv0isvO31VEymENRyOfaajOGaW3RtYxSAblkz1HgthE1k_w1_jysCs5FKCeKaLhfOPhxuzsIhOxdFdDY7HdeI4-eBo1znP_ePE6cyC). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=kqVmlG-YfsRAtPRputOG3JSZpOAtyPwOt79rMxFrMvtifAZIkjD5VadkHpFKjmAKoKHkyoWw06Rn4_O8WktRuhGCdGp5UdJeRBIlXTsCkELokdUD7dwGTrVICKKou5oHxBQGfUHmF4Y2EmfQphgdD3-bV-Wwi-UxQcngxFVlhekg1ZgMoBraRUBj4tRiAhpgOTPrJWWWoR1fOV-mKB4Y3Idyvdv7LJjvniQmYuU9Kk04OsPfri5em7aMK4U0kvYVFNz0U9YgB35gIiAYmhO1KWySuGLwezgzpxFjpw6qAcPPTxciPn6alkPj4PHCFZcn8QaIyVHUUlCdDwmUcqKxuoBkTQxeeavO9PXb6Ldvf3V7jdVNcV5_GUMzlpowfors) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=kqVmlG-YfsRAtPRputOG3JSZpOAtyPwOt79rMxFrMvtXeluHzicbRHmDkhhrQU76o3qxdHL5bypHyj9iVQWRCLeK_z5PxA5J2G8bn7ByIwiqbW7xFdd6NwCHv1SGgk0B8hKqRqi-kCwp5Vj_469xyOqhAs4p280TOLSAYnsJtOpDwqPSYmnhj3RctvW9wsPvQ6teN3-JU8QU1KRK5Bu1lEogUTn5oxXFUKL35vwLY_pEcZDYYYxZKZazAswaUfHDsZtI5Gy8pQ2FdcDLOtOkrkSmaclQksrtTHES7x3bYJqwSoluAoKT2OLFK_XZeUGuN7Nfp1jL6myurE8SfduNkdlAJ0OAbJ96oPpYLk0DLcQWiADPuxTxmSBppczhgswe) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=kqVmlG-YfsRAtPRputOG3AOi6Xfl4MuRmglqvhlq4myD9e8QutXEPMuCUL9bVx8hYtbpFtT9lNLdo2esqw6DQ8fzQHRqO2vR0UaLTERl7M_NvhLOG_TmDtGREWU7m4cG6c7KnAp1xDtLtuJCRZvXS-CoAhXfojXCABQonNqglBtyfejm_4XCOt5tUffP6TqAWZy0z2FTqIIkH2kjbN8IoYcRU9jhJoe1CNzmk9LQXpiHL1cD-DgWLKLiC2_xaw9aUOK8VUeclN7pMRLEJfwG5w%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=kqVmlG-YfsRAtPRputOG3Mwp9cEEMPq49lEvH2YoxZUGYeKEx-LmhePK8YIC34Lm_kyLpZ5mJHyl02VV1IaUYU50c9CUnJ0iEpDBSjBGV3EVhdex98FOM7Z7aYYOisWJLiZenf8nkEqZoIddHYPyIF4pv3onlsH4q7L_W-UyH0lkBgiLDo1uhsGa9r6cVz1g7FljAezccU6Jrqn22D4CpVyzHwBTmoZUFDm43D3w-q2TMOaNVwkrZrQO2kdQr2nTAtwqupksrEPVnoCH9qQsgA%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=kqVmlG-YfsRAtPRputOG3JkuC_GxtarkCjpB_UILqUGexKz-uG2XBVaegDUfZ1uElKKKjDWMeVi8og8-fccAZje2BlqsR-mNxvH7qCTsHafMckZRcQ3etVUGCs90yHyl3B4elnrtKzU8B6qTYaflyJdieujLKritLq2JrJft1sRtcNKOhNfvKkz1QuPT4_n0sc4gdITrv_3OdmPoSomi7iDYaqhCJ8tW6kvq-W54e96se3zbHgg4ynO66TUVEXhTsCdScPV5LHFMvDQlS1uy8w%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=kqVmlG-YfsRAtPRputOG3JSZpOAtyPwOt79rMxFrMvuUtcgA85DUnwSE1nTviaUEAWm5HTiH3gsXOsl5q7j2sPIGsxG6R4Z3ZrLeVRfjOvVgyTeKBvGQllAqNIFk3Mp4UeGYjWsaSWOyCbWadExHycLHLEcUOTsjAIJqXbA6VOhWYCabPwHcN7UlQdFCMDkIxMZ1LzFg4WUq4KL6970JnUD3B2riAYyE6nmgcgAqNb7ZCq14Ic0ARk2xvjNuda5BNlnWONgCSJOAIOWFGdhEPz7PxLgIYFvbSuL4X793q8-iGNtoGKRttYcdQTwdUduAR7FPa9yeHGhStxMplkh3Mn7UOmw9FqR-zLMBjK1KeV0ObKeRtcYlhKWMlg91ZGBxN4hLTktYhFvhjQYkwpz_8w%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=Nwc0W_9dWznsh2Rbjxn_ZmY9Qtw5BgSQFC0DG1H6SmWRVWazRS91f-_m3w98pzh_2-w5wdtaJnKha3cQyA3o5vVvEJ5jFg-aDKIzIXgrnUDQL5JoZyv25XcFSY36PjOV9WM6vu1Fah3hbdBToUhsJSe9FQyv0isvO31VEymENRyOfaajOGaW3RtYxSAblkz1HgthE1k_w1_jysCs5FKCeKaLhfOPhxuzsIhOxdFdDY7HdeI4-eBo1znP_ePE6cyC) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=73213c02dd5c4f66ac372ab16210520a&_e=Nwc0W_9dWznsh2Rbjxn_ZmY9Qtw5BgSQFC0DG1H6SmWRVWazRS91f-_m3w98pzh_2-w5wdtaJnKha3cQyA3o5vVvEJ5jFg-aDKIzIXgrnUDQL5JoZyv25XcFSY36PjOV9WM6vu1Fah3hbdBToUhsJSe9FQyv0isvO31VEymENRyOfaajOGaW3RtYxSAblkz1HgthE1k_w1_jysCs5FKCeKaLhfOPhxuzsIhOxdFdDY7HdeI4-eBo1znP_ePE6cyC) to unsubscribe. Remember, contributions to Leah for Senate are not tax deductible.

name: Jessalyn Reid
subject: This is an actual email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
This is not a "cookie cutter" fundraising email that was written by a consulting firm - in fact, you should know that none of the emails we send you are. This is an actual email, written by me, Jess.
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hey Derek:

This is not a "cookie cutter" fundraising email that was written by a consulting firm - in fact, you should know that none of the emails we send you are. This is an actual email, written by me, Jess, to you, Derek.

And _this_ is not a graphic whipped up by a team of designers. This is an actual screenshot, copy and pasted into this email. It's copied from a spreadsheet I stare at pretty much all day, titled "Email Fundraising" (we're not very creative with our spreadsheet naming). _And what this percentage and progress bar represents is our "percent-to-goal" for our September fundraising goal:_ [](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a4/3e0906/70707fb6/3e366365/3963106901/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS&source=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS") I'm sharing this with you because I am legitimately concerned that we won't get that red bar all the way to 100% in the next 6 days. [Can you pitch in any amount - seriously, whatever you can afford - right now?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a4/3e0906/70707fb6/3e366364/3963106901/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+pitch+in+any+amount++seriously+w&utm_campaign=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS&source=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS")

I know what you're thinking: Can't Tim Kaine win without my hard-earned spare dollars?

The answer to that is: _Maybe._

But when we say "Maybe," that also means, "Maybe not." **We just don 't know.** Whether the polls show Tim up by a whole lot, or the race narrowing to less than 5 points, the truth is (and this is an expression we say every day at Kaine HQ): _The only poll that matters is the one on Election Day._

**So "Maybe" just isn't good enough.** We need to be able to know FOR SURE that we are doing enough to keep Corey Stewart out of the U.S. Senate. And right now, we don't.

[So I'm asking you today to please dig deep and pitch in to get us to 100% to goal.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a4/3e0906/70707fb6/3e366379/3963106901/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+So+Irsquom+asking+you+today+to+please+di&utm_campaign=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS&source=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a4/3e0906/70707fb6/3e36637d/3963106901/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+5&utm_campaign=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS&source=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS")

Your donations do so, so much. They get our TV ads up on the air in markets all across Virginia. They allow us to run a sophisticated, targeted digital advertising program. They keep the lights on in our 20+ field offices across the Commonwealth.

And besides all that, you should know that your contributions to Tim are about so much more than just him - they also support all ELEVEN Democrats running for the House here in Virginia. Including districts we never before imagined were flippable, but now have an actual chance of winning!

So seriously - from the bottom of my heart (and I am not an earnest person usually): **THANK YOU.**

I know it's exhausting to keep up with politics these days. I know it's exhausting to even check your email these days! But I hope you know that I personally appreciate every time you open one of these emails, whether or not you're able to click that "donate" button.

_Please stick with us._

[https://secure.timkaine.com/Final-Quarterly-Public-Deadline](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a4/3e0906/70707fb6/3e36634e/3963106901/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+httpssecuretimkainecomFinalQuarterlyPubl&utm_campaign=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS&source=20180924_3_FR_JR_actual-email-LDND-RS")

_-Jess_

clean_body: This is not a "cookie cutter" fundraising email that was written by a consulting firm - in fact, you should know that none of the emails we send you are. This is an actual email, written by me, Jess. | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hey Derek: This is not a "cookie cutter" fundraising email that was written by a consulting firm - in fact, you should know that none of the emails we send you are. This is an actual email, written by me, Jess, to you, Derek. And this is not a graphic whipped up by a team of designers. This is an actual screenshot, copy and pasted into this email. It's copied from a spreadsheet I stare at pretty much all day, titled "Email Fundraising" (we're not very creative with our spreadsheet naming). And what this percentage and progress bar represents is our "percent-to-goal" for our September fundraising goal: "" I'm sharing this with you because I am legitimately concerned that we won't get that red bar all the way to 100% in the next 6 days. "" I know what you're thinking: Can't Tim Kaine win without my hard-earned spare dollars? The answer to that is: Maybe. But when we say "Maybe," that also means, "Maybe not." We just don 't know. Whether the polls show Tim up by a whole lot, or the race narrowing to less than 5 points, the truth is (and this is an expression we say every day at Kaine HQ): The only poll that matters is the one on Election Day. So "Maybe" just isn't good enough. We need to be able to know FOR SURE that we are doing enough to keep Corey Stewart out of the U.S. Senate. And right now, we don't. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Your donations do so, so much. They get our TV ads up on the air in markets all across Virginia. They allow us to run a sophisticated, targeted digital advertising program. They keep the lights on in our 20+ field offices across the Commonwealth. And besides all that, you should know that your contributions to Tim are about so much more than just him - they also support all ELEVEN Democrats running for the House here in Virginia. Including districts we never before imagined were flippable, but now have an actual chance of winning! So seriously - from the bottom of my heart (and I am not an earnest person usually): THANK YOU. I know it's exhausting to keep up with politics these days. I know it's exhausting to even check your email these days! But I hope you know that I personally appreciate every time you open one of these emails, whether or not you're able to click that "donate" button. Please stick with us. "" -Jess Jessalyn Reid Digital Director Kaine for Virginia * | "" "" ""

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: We need to talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Good evening Peter, Sherrod here. I'm sorry to reach out on a Monday, but we need to talk. [**This is a personal request for a contribution.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe0d/4462dc26/7b2eeae9/201adaa8/3119689034/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI0eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180924z?refcode=sbe180924z_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Last I heard, we were tracking behind our FEC goal. We can make up the deficit, but only if we get $7,500 in by midnight. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe0d/4462dc26/7b2eeae9/201adaaf/3119689034/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI0eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0MlpYSnphVzl1ZlgwPSI6Im0ifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180924z?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180924z_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe0d/4462dc26/7b2eeae9/201adaaf/3119689034/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI0eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIxMCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180924z?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180924z_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe0d/4462dc26/7b2eeae9/201adaaf/3119689034/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI0eiIsImUzdGhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180924z?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180924z_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe0d/4462dc26/7b2eeae9/201adaa8/3119689034/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI0eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180924z?refcode=sbe180924z_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Your support is essential in keeping our TV ads on the air. Recent polling shows my opponent, multi-millionaire Congressman Jim Renacci, within four points -- the closest we've seen yet. So if you can, use this secure link to help us fight back: [**www.SherrodBrown.com/BeforeMidnight**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe0d/4462dc26/7b2eeae9/201adaa8/3119689034/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwOTI0eiIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180924z?refcode=sbe180924z_m_other&refcode2=3268183") With gratitude, Sherrod

subject: This changes things

body:

name: =?utf-8?Q?Linda_S=C3=A1nchez?=
subject: The American people want a fair approach on taxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez
body:
Instead of passing tax breaks for the wealthy, Congress should working to make healthcare and education more affordable. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_180924_Tax_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Peter, this really caught my eye:
[](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?refcode=RTW_180924_Tax_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Republican insiders recently conducted an internal poll, and were shocked to find that Americans by a 2-to-1 margin believe that the recent tax bill benefits the wealthy and large corporations over middle-class Americans.

**The American people believe this because it 's the truth.** Last year, while this scam of a bill was being debated, I wrote at length about how it would _increase_ taxes for many California homeowners and put a heavy burden on states that finance most of their education.

**[Congress needs to get its priorities straight, and that's why I'm working so hard to flip the House. Will you donate before next Sunday's FEC deadline so that I have the resources to assist Democratic challengers in California and across the country?](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?refcode=RTW_180924_Tax_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Instead of passing tax breaks for the wealthy, Congress should be working to make healthcare and education more affordable. It should be fighting to give all our workers a living wage. It should be reinvesting in our infrastructure so that we can fix our roads and bridges while creating jobs.

But _none_ of this will happen as long as Congress is under Republican control. So we've got to push harder than ever these next 43 days to change that!

**[Are you with me, Peter? We still need $6,806 more to reach our goal before the public deadline. Please chip in what you can!](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtw_180918_ls_eoq?refcode=RTW_180924_Tax_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Thank you,

Linda

**Rep. Linda S anchez proudly serves the 38th District of California. She is the fifth-highest ranking member of Leadership as the Vice Chair of the House Democratic Caucus and is the highest-ranking Latina in Congress. As a mother, union member, and progressive, Linda will always fight for America's working families.** **[CONTRIBUTE](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_180924_Tax_EM&&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---

You can contribute to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez by [**donating here.**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366fc/4ac3d62d/6a3df7ee/1ce289bd/1905196673/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ls_support?refcode=footer&amount=25.00&recurring=auto")
Contributions or gifts to The Committee to Re-Elect Linda Sanchez are not tax deductible.

You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. Still support Linda but want fewer emails? **[Go here](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366fc/4ac3d62d/6a3df7ee/1ce289b2/1905196673/VEsB/ "https://secure.voteforlinda.com/page/signup/linda-sanchez-lite")** to sign up to receive less email from our campaign. [**Click here**](http://ca.voteforlinda.com/page/m/150366fc/4ac3d62d/6a3df7ee/1ce289b3/1905196673/VEsO/ "http://ca.voteforlinda.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages and enter dpwillis67@gmail.com so we can unsubscribe you from our list.

Norwalk, CA 90652

name: Tabitha Isner for Congress
subject: This is the Alabama I love.
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/62300/images/Logos/Logo3.PNG]
Dear Friend, this is the Alabama I love.

We hear a lot about how our state scrapes the bottom of the barrel over and over again. Number 46 in Healthcare. Number 47 in Education. Number 48 in Opportunity. Just like you, I wince when I hear those statistics. Because I know thar Alabama has strengths these numbers don't capture, and I believe we can capitalize on those strengths to make a comeback.

In the state that led the world during the Civil Rights Movement, we know that progressive and impactful change can happen right here within our borders.

Donate $25 now to help us do it. Click Here! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/isner2018]

Our people are strong, compassionate, and hard-working in Alabama. We hold doors open for strangers behind us. We lend a helping hand to our neighbors when they need it. We’re tenacious and free-thinking. We house farms that feed the world and research that informs the world. We create cars that drive the world and educational institutions that teach the world. And, most of all, we are capable of incredible things when we work together with and for our fellow man.

It’s time that our public office holders represent that Alabama, the one with great potential and selfless hopes for the future. Not the Alabama that’s last on every list. Not the Alabama that accepts poverty and suffering as 'just the way it is.' It’s time that we stop letting politicians hold us down to the bottom of the barrel. We deserve so much more.

I want to represent the Alabama I love, Friend .
Commit to making that Alabama a tangible reality.
Send me to Congress.
Donate $25 today!

Donate Now! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Lw7E5S3uc0eS5ySIJdKd2Q2?emci=15a1e66f-34c0-e811-af11-28187847c89e&emdi=71f1f6d9-c0c0-e811-af11-28187847c89e&ceid=6898985&am=&contactdata=fen83xW%2Fav%2B4sAsec%2FDnm5otOZz0NQRKBBocP%2F58kq7vTaSTWPf3vBFdoUxl%2BDFu]
Connect With Us:Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/TabithaIsner] Contact Info:Call Tabitha at 334-538-4822
Twitter [http://www.twitter.com/TabithaK] Checks made out to "Friends of Tabitha Isner" can be sent to:
Campaign HQ Address: PO Box 6340
1460 Ann St. Montgomery, AL 36106
Montgomery, AL 36106

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Sitting ducks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/UWBsObC-0bryAm1aqgCSp8Xc8dAoyIlFvox08bCi67w=/_Nu2jgrozS0v8wTrbWaqjAHTMaQSKY_ySRX1FUBKQO0=) Friends and Neighbors -- One of the primary responsibilities of the office of Florida Chief Financial Officer is to make sure your hard earned tax dollars are being spent in the way you were assured - repeatedly - they would be. The CFO is also the state's chief insurance regulator and is responsible for making sure that consumers are protected. Unfortunately, the policies of Governor Scott and the current CFO have transferred all risk to consumers. And, while that might mean lower insurance rates for some now, it isn't good for anyone in the future. **It 's all just a question of when -- not if.** _When_ another hurricane environmental disaster or storm -- such as Hurricane Maria or Tropical Storm Alberto or even one like Florence, like we have seen in the Carolinas \-- strikes, Florida consumers, **their homes and their livelihoods, will, once again, be the proverbial sitting ducks in its wake.** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/UWBsObC-0bryAm1aqgCSp8Xc8dAoyIlFvox08bCi67w=/15pD-b4BMqcvDlq3-fjW6s9f2b582uFClF8kkv3z2Rk=?am=3&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) [Help Jeremy protect Florida. Chip in $20.18](https://act.myngp.com/el/UWBsObC-0bryAm1aqgCSp8Xc8dAoyIlFvox08bCi67w=/15pD-b4BMqcvDlq3-fjW6s9f2b582uFClF8kkv3z2Rk=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) What Florida needs is an insurance environment that works for everyone -- those who live on the coast, those who live inland and the insurance companies. We shouldn't be chasing insurance companies out of the state -- we need a competitive marketplace. **That 's where I'll come in.** As your next CFO, I will help make sure Florida is prepared for another hurricane or whatever Mother Nature - and climate change - may have in store for us. But I have an election to win first - coming up just around the corner, on November 6th. **And I can 't do it without your help.** [**Can you make a donation of $20.18 or more today, to help me make sure Florida is prepared for another hurricane or natural disaster?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/UWBsObC-0bryAm1aqgCSp8Xc8dAoyIlFvox08bCi67w=/15pD-b4BMqcvDlq3-fjW6s9f2b582uFClF8kkv3z2Rk=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for everything you do, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

subject: President Trump, at UN General Assembly, Signs Major Trade Deal with South Korea
body:
| |
---
#
# **_President Trump, at UN General Assembly, Signs Major Trade Deal with South Korea_**
#
“President Trump and South Korean President Moon Jae-in signed a major agreement of Trump’s trade agenda Monday, on a busy day at the U.N. General Assembly,” Frank Miles reports for Fox News. With the new deal, “U.S. automobiles, pharmaceuticals, and agricultural products will gain better access to Korean markets.” “This agreement will reduce bureaucracy and increase prosperity in both of our countries. Workers in South Korea and America will find new customers and new opportunities to expand and grow,” President Trump said. [**Click here to read more.**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzE5MjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTMxOTI5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwMzA5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&http://www.foxnews.com/politics/2018/09/24/trump-at-un-general-assembly-signs-major-trade-deal-with-south-korea-reveals-possible-kim-jong-un-meeting-soon.html) In [**_The Daily Signal_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzE5MjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTMxOTI5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwMzA5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.dailysignal.com/2018/09/24/how-the-economic-boom-is-lifting-latino-communities/), LIBRE Initiative President Daniel Garza writes that Latino communities have been lifted in this booming economy. “According to the [Census] Bureau, median household income in the U.S. has increased for three consecutive years,” he writes. “That’s also true for Hispanic households in particular, who saw their median income increase by 3.7 percent in just the last year.” Professors at Yale University have a released “a new study calculating there are between 16 million and 30 million illegal immigrants in the U.S. — as much as three times more than most demographers figure,” Stephen Dinan reports in [**_The Washington Times_**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzE5MjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTMxOTI5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwMzA5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.washingtontimes.com/news/2018/sep/24/yale-study-finds-us-illegal-immigrant-population-s/). “The professors’ model looked at estimates of how many people came illegally, and how many people likely left, and concluded there are a lot more people who arrived than the 11 million suggested by traditional estimates.” “CIA Director Gina Haspel pledged Monday that the spy agency would step up its efforts to stem the flow of opioids into the U.S., saying illegal drugs have killed more Americans than terrorists,” Ken Dilanian reports for [**NBC News**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzE5MjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTMxOTI5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwMzA5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/national-security/cia-director-gina-haspel-pledges-target-opioids-entering-u-s-n912506). “Haspel made the remarks in her first public appearance as director, speaking at the University of Louisville in her native Kentucky, where she earned a degree.”
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzE5MjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTMxOTI5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwMzA5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzE5MjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTMxOTI5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwMzA5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzE5MjkxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTMxOTI5MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwMzA5JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

**This is BAD, friends. We had to take our TV ad off the air.**
Right now, corporate special interests and the Koch brothers are spending hundreds of thousands to defeat Molly and make sure Governor Chris Sununu stays in Concord - they're desperate to keep their friend in the corner office.
While Sununu is deep in the pocket of corporations, Molly is fueling this campaign with donations from grassroots supporters like you. **She doesn't owe a thing to special interests.**
The ONLY way we can get our ad back on the air - and elect Molly - is if grassroots donors like you give right now. **So we're counting on you: We need to raise $10,000 IMMEDIATELY to get our ad back on the air, and we simply can't afford to come up short.**

name: Khizr Khan
subject: If you read one email today, I hope it is this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, I'm writing today because Senator Kaine needs our help.

There are a lot of great campaigns and programs this year that will make sure we elect representatives with our values to Congress. **They all deserve your support if you can spare it, but as a Virginian, what Tim Kaine is doing is very dear to my heart.**

**First:** Senator Kaine is working together with all eleven House candidates. His resources are their resources, they share offices and staff. When I donate to his campaign, send an email on his behalf, or attend an event, I am helping Virginia create a path to take back the House _and_ the Senate.

**Second:** Tim Kaine's opponent reminds me of someone I know, someone I have spoken up against before. He says things that are mean-spirited. He seeks to divide us. So this, Derek, is an election we must win.

**His campaign tells me they are further behind in fundraising than they had hoped to be, with a little over $75,000 to raise in less than a week. I know these people, I know how thoughtfully they spend your donations.**

[Can you join me by clicking here and helping them reach this goal?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a6/3e0906/707fc377/3e3663bb/3676603066/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180925_1_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+join+me+by+clicking+here+and+hel&utm_campaign=20180925_1_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ&source=20180925_1_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ")

Thank you for reading my message today.

Respectfully,

_Khizr Khan_ | [**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a6/3e0906/707fc377/3e3663ba/3676603066/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180925_1_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ&amount=35&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180925_1_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ&source=20180925_1_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a6/3e0906/707fc377/3e3663bc/3676603066/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180925_1_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ&source=20180925_1_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ") Thanks for having Tim's back!

2001 Jefferson Davis Highway, Suite 909
Arlington, VA 22202

[Unsubscribe](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a6/3e0906/707fc377/3e3663b3/3676603066/VEsP/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+Unsubscribe&utm_campaign=20180925_1_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ&source=20180925_1_FR_Khan_Khan-EOQ")

| | Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
---
clean_body: | | Derek, I'm writing today because Senator Kaine needs our help. There are a lot of great campaigns and programs this year that will make sure we elect representatives with our values to Congress. They all deserve your support if you can spare it, but as a Virginian, what Tim Kaine is doing is very dear to my heart. First: Senator Kaine is working together with all eleven House candidates. His resources are their resources, they share offices and staff. When I donate to his campaign, send an email on his behalf, or attend an event, I am helping Virginia create a path to take back the House and the Senate. Second: Tim Kaine's opponent reminds me of someone I know, someone I have spoken up against before. He says things that are mean-spirited. He seeks to divide us. So this, Derek, is an election we must win. His campaign tells me they are further behind in fundraising than they had hoped to be, with a little over $75,000 to raise in less than a week. I know these people, I know how thoughtfully they spend your donations. "" Thank you for reading my message today. Respectfully, Khizr Khan | "" * | "" "" ""

name: Ann Wasserman
subject: a note for my daughter
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Friend, When my daughter Debbie came into my life (I won't tell you how long ago), everything changed. She was a special kid, and I know every parent says that, but it's true. And, yes, I know every parent says that, too. That's the point. **The day my daughter Debbie was born, I knew what every parent knows -- that I would do anything for this kid.** I remember the first time she was big enough to open her own birthday present. Her eyes lit up, she attacked the wrapping paper with both hands, sent it flying, and then wondered when she would get to do it all over again. I think she figured out right away that it's usually more fun to open a gift than to have it. [**My daughter is all grown up now, with a family of her own and the responsibility of standing up to the Trump administration on behalf of families across America. So I 'm writing to you to ask that you sign her birthday card -- I know she would appreciate it, and I would too.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca9/622b7b5b/1cfbc4cc/307b6c18/1928781383/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180925") I know the campaign wants to go for a big number here -- 2,700 signatures, because Debbie's birthday is on the 27th. I get it. I don't know if we'll get that many, and I don't care. Debbie is my daughter and I love her, and no matter how many times I see her on the floor of Congress fighting for the people she represents, she's still my baby girl. I'm so proud of Debbie. Debbie's a fighter, and whether it's fighting for health care or reproductive freedom, she stands out as a voice for justice. [**So please, if you have a moment, will you sign my daughter 's birthday card?**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113ca9/622b7b5b/1cfbc4cc/307b6c18/1928781383/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180925") Thank you, Ann
---

|
---
| | Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
---

name: betofortexas.com
subject: we need to make history
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
body:
[1]Beto for Texas

When we kicked off our campaign for Senate over a year ago, Beto put his
campaign -- and his trust -- fully in your hands, pledging to not accept
money from PACs. Beto made a promise to rely 100% on people to power this
movement.

[1]Beto for Texas

Kicking off Beto’s campaign for Senate. El Paso, March 21, 2017.

Since then, tens of thousands of grassroots supporters across
Texas and the country
have stepped up to pitch in $5 bucks at a time, helping us out-raise the
sitting junior Senator from Texas time and time again. Now, for the final
few weeks of this campaign, we’re calling on our supporters to take your
support to the next level.

[2]Beto for Texas

Collin County, September 15, 2018.

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180925&t=1019&akid=12855%2E444211%2EZZSc8b ]Right now, we’re up against the biggest fundraising goal of our
campaign: we need to raise $5 million online from grassroots donations by
midnight on September 30. Step up
today with a donation to Beto’s
campaign »

[23]Beto for Texas

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180925&t=1020&akid=12855%2E444211%2EZZSc8b ]Contribute
$3
»

Right now, we’re building the biggest ‘get out the vote’ operation in
Texas history -- because that’s what it’s going to take to get Beto
elected. Basically, we
need to make history in the next few weeks.

We need to activate volunteers in each of Texas’ 254 counties to knock on
doors and make phone calls to voters. For many of these folks, this will
the first campaign they’ve ever volunteered for!

[25]Beto for Texas

Beto for Texas volunteers in San Antonio.

Your grassroots donations help us get resources to our organizers and
volunteers across Texas. Every dollar in the door will help us pay for
things like field offices in as many parts of Texas as possible, and the
cutting-edge digital organizing tools we’re using to contact voters
online. Heck, it even helps fill up the tank on the campaign truck that
gets Beto to hundreds of public town halls!

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180925&t=1021&akid=12855%2E444211%2EZZSc8b ]Rush a contribution to Beto’s
campaign today and make sure we don’t miss our end-of-quarter fundraising
goal. We need to raise $5 million online from grassroots donations before
midnight on September 30.

We’re so grateful to have you in our corner. As Beto always says, YOU are
making our campaign possible -- so thank you for all that you do.

Team Beto

[ https://act.betofortexas.com/go/8988?refcode=em20180925&t=1022&akid=12855%2E444211%2EZZSc8b ]Contribute
$3
»

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-email?refcode=em20180925footer&t=1023&akid=12855%2E444211%2EZZSc8b

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betofortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=12855%2E444211%2EZZSc8b

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR TEXAS
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

body:
This weekend, we announced some HUGE news. Vice President Mike Pence is coming back home again, and will provide the keynote remarks at the 2018... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/icymi-vp-pence-to-headline-fall-dinner?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---

---
|
---
| **ICYMI: VP Pence is Coming Back Home!**
_**Will Keynote 2018 Indiana Republican Fall Dinner**_
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3374c535ef&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Over the weekend, we announced some HUGE news: **Vice President Mike Pence is coming back home again, and will provide the keynote remarks at the 2018 Indiana Republican Party Fall Dinner!**

Join us on Friday, October 12, in Indianapolis [as we make Hoosier history](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8ae5478184&e=1acd9bb3d6) with the Vice President of the United States!

---
| [Guarantee Your Tickets. Book NOW! ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e91e5e0dec&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Guarantee Your Tickets. Book NOW! ")
---
| It's an event you won't want to miss, as we come together with Republicans from across the state just weeks ahead of Election Day.

If you've been to a grassroots event or even flipped on a TV recently, then you know how critical Indiana is this year. With our state's closely-watched U.S. Senate race, Hoosiers likely will determine which party leads the Senate, and whether President Donald Trump will continue his work to change business as usual in Washington.

Indiana continues to stand at the center of the political world -- and by defeating Democrat Joe Donnelly and electing Mike Braun, we can send in the reinforcement President Trump needs in the Senate! We simply cannot let Democrats obstruct the lower taxes, deregulation, and economic growth we're seeing today.

**So join this winning team of Hoosiers -- Vice President Mike Pence, Governor Eric Holcomb, and Indiana's next U.S. Senator, Mike Braun -- on October 12 for a history-making night in Indiana!**

Tickets to this event are already selling quickly, [so make sure you book now and don't miss out](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=77c4c915cc&e=1acd9bb3d6)!

-Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

---

body:

[**_With only 42 days left until Election Day, a group of donors announced that they are willing to match every online donation up to $15,000 because they know how important it is to keep Pennsylvania's Senate seat blue this year. Can you make a $5 donation to help meet that match goal today?_**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180925_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Democrats have a path to take back the Senate majority this year, but everyone agrees that we need to win here in Pennsylvania to have a shot. This administration has come after affordable health care, people with pre-existing conditions and programs like Medicare, Medicaid and Social Security, which so many Pennsylvanians depend on to survive. We need Bob fighting for us in the Senate, but we're not on track to meet our goal before Sunday's big end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, so we need to take advantage of every dollar of this match opportunity.

Without Bob as our firewall in the Senate, this administration will continue to push its anti-middle-class agenda, and now that the balance of the Supreme Court is on the line, we can't take that risk. **Can you chip in $5 today? name: Tina Smith
subject: The first votes of the 2018 general election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Minnesota is first.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. name: Jason Yates
subject: National Voter Registration Day – Are you ready?
body:
Peter,
Today is National Voter Registration Day!
The mid-term elections are only 41 days away and in many states, the deadline to register is 30 days before Election Day.
It’s critical you and thousands of Christians across the nation take a few minutes today to prioritize voting!
**If we do these three simple steps - we can make a big impact on the elections!**
1. Double check your [registration status](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOGEO2h4j1N2evJh-1OobUhESLG9ERfginKUqa2oxKg3vA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180925com01&n=1) to make sure you are ready to vote
2. Register to vote with the use of [My Faith Votes' Personal Voting Assistant](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=W3Yb-TMNiCpf2bUXWC85Gj4PJUDDgj7DceR5UFSs_Ly-BJCglOIB654u94lANMG9&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180925com01&n=2)
3. Request your [absentee ballot](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=W3Yb-TMNiCpf2bUXWC85Gj4PJUDDgj7DceR5UFSs_Ly-BJCglOIB654u94lANMG9&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180925com01&n=3) if you are unable to vote in person
4. Share this email with your friends and family to help them get ready to vote

We have all the information and tools you need to make this super easy!
Check out the [Voting Assistance Center and the election map](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iUNGKee3_hgG2DzKC9zCC90LnQIrJoQoXYqjFoj8SFKP3tlrJDu0ifiNHeUIf0jICpiUlNd39gAU-wibZNZPEOGEO2h4j1N2evJh-1OobUhESLG9ERfginKUqa2oxKg3vA&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180925com01&n=4) to learn all the details for your state and use the [Personal Voting Assistant to register or request your absentee ballot.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=W3Yb-TMNiCpf2bUXWC85Gj4PJUDDgj7DceR5UFSs_Ly-BJCglOIB654u94lANMG9&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180925com01&n=5)
Thank you for your commitment to see Christians stand for biblical values in the public square.
United in our prayers and our efforts we can make a lasting difference in our communities and our nation!
**United. We Stand.**
Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180925com01&n=6)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180925com01&n=7).

body:

name: Team Gillum
subject: This is it, friends:
body:
\--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36fd/9e00690/5c051ec2/24010f25/1670689732/VEsH/ "https://andrewgillum.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=gillum&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=em18_180925_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_nono__TG_ettx&source=em18_180925_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_nono__TG_ettx")
Friends,

Our campaign continues to gain momentum and earn the support of folks who are ready for Mayor Andrew Gillum and Chris King's bold, progressive plans to move our state forward.

But that means Republican mega-donors and big money special interests are paying attention to the strength of this campaign too, and right now we're being attacked on TV. This election is a huge opportunity for Democrats to take back the Governor's mansion, but we're going to need your help to execute our get-out-the-vote efforts.

This Sunday is the final end-of-quarter deadline before the general election, and every in-state donation under $250 will be MATCHED.

**[We need this grassroots movement to raise another $250,000 to stay on track. Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can afford, now to help us bring it home in November?](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36fd/9e00690/5c051ec2/24010f3d/1670689732/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-eoq?gpsid=8_55_3831&refcode=em18_180925_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_nono__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180925_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_nono__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=9+-+We+need+this+grassroots+movement+to+rais")**

Everyday people have struggled to get ahead for the last two decades under Republican control. And, instead of introducing real plans to help Floridians, Ron DeSantis has spent his time using divisive, gutter politics-style attacks to tear down our campaign.

Mayor Gillum and Chris will reverse the damage caused by Rick Scott and rebuild our state and economy into one that works for every Floridian. So, if we don't want another four years of a failed administration, we need to get out the vote and reach every voter in Florida over the next few weeks.

**[The only way we can do that is by reaching our $250,000 grassroots fundraising goal. Donate $5 to have your grassroots donation doubled and help Mayor Gillum and Chris King hit our FINAL end-of-quarter deadline.](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36fd/9e00690/5c051ec2/24010f3c/1670689732/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-eoq?gpsid=8_55_3831&refcode=em18_180925_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_nono__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180925_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_nono__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=10+-+The+only+way+we+can+do+that+is+by+reachi")**

Bring it home,

Team Gillum

[DOUBLE MY DONATION](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb36fd/9e00690/5c051ec2/24010f3f/1670689732/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gillum-eoq?gpsid=8_55_3831&refcode=em18_180925_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_nono__TG_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180925_EOQ1_fnd_gq_act_nono__TG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=agil&firstname=&lastname=&zip=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&recur_weekly=yes&utm_content=11+-+DOUBLE+MY+DONATION")

clean_body: \-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- "" Friends, Our campaign continues to gain momentum and earn the support of folks who are ready for Mayor Andrew Gillum and Chris King's bold, progressive plans to move our state forward. But that means Republican mega-donors and big money special interests are paying attention to the strength of this campaign too, and right now we're being attacked on TV. This election is a huge opportunity for Democrats to take back the Governor's mansion, but we're going to need your help to execute our get-out-the-vote efforts. This Sunday is the final end-of-quarter deadline before the general election, and every in-state donation under $250 will be MATCHED. "" Everyday people have struggled to get ahead for the last two decades under Republican control. And, instead of introducing real plans to help Floridians, Ron DeSantis has spent his time using divisive, gutter politics-style attacks to tear down our campaign. Mayor Gillum and Chris will reverse the damage caused by Rick Scott and rebuild our state and economy into one that works for every Floridian. So, if we don't want another four years of a failed administration, we need to get out the vote and reach every voter in Florida over the next few weeks. "" Bring it home, Team Gillum "" Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor. Andrew Gillum for Governor 240 N. Magnolia Drive Tallahassee, FL 32301

name: Eric Trump
subject: I’m writing this check in your honor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We’re fighting together. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a84f86def8bb9e64e85d9a794e6dca0b501e0039566c583dd3a3329772afa4a152f3091c0fc9194c48120ed88259667dd6504902dc3a6798)
---

Friend,

While at times it can feel like everyone's against us, I want you to know that you're not in this fight alone.

**So today, I 'm going to write a check to help protect our majorities AND help my father win his re-election campaign in 2020.

And if you join me in making a contribution before our FINAL FEC deadline of the election (9/30 at 11:59 PM), it will be MATCHED. **

---
| [CONTRIBUTE $20 = $40](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3727eda8e8b285c9a954b000a1e07df0dab25bdff4e7eca211da39ba4047b511da31b2f6b5fbc76b7e739d749cae7fcaa607d77384d0d4c3) [CONTRIBUTE $15 = $30](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3727eda8e8b285c9f359cbcb8981c11423bd34386cfd4effb0ab056d2882ad74478cbc00fedb67bd4a60acb0786f175f004ad4487c0ebb0a) [CONTRIBUTE $10 = $20](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3727eda8e8b285c9ef8da743dad3dbbcf0d5b680b3dabf91d1db8845b741d1449c90bc2de21845080d859b663c4f4505628987f518859bfe) [CONTRIBUTE $5 = $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3727eda8e8b285c973e8643fc88e81efe085977dc1db062cc83508c8eeb35ed04d2ce69ff101cf979f9f7eead1f2c3412ae045d9e2cc0e2d) [CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3727eda8e8b285c9bf599cf7ab6a2a44bef66ed628ce74633729f5ea285eeb1b7b461eb61c1eab9e4ac0c10ae150c87565f7de3ea7127082)

I'll be honest -- when I hear the vicious attacks hurled against my father, it's hard not to take them _personally._

But then I remember that he chose to walk away from his old life to enlist in this fight. I remember that he's given a voice to 63 million forgotten Americans.

He knew what he was getting into. _We all did_. We knew that draining the swamp would force us to see the ugliest monsters lurking at the bottom.

They launch witch hunts against innocent men. They attack Sarah Huckabee Sanders. They've even barricaded our Homeland Security Director's house because she's trying to end illegal immigration.

_That 's why I felt compelled to write to you today, and tell you that I'm making a contribution._

**[Join me in making a contribution before our FINAL FEC deadline on 9/30 at 11:59 PM -- and it will be MATCHED.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3727eda8e8b285c9dc9414819c5d0f7e52ffeab3ca4fc4fdae4110ee2f9baa9a86ac16d8224864cd137af76d97e444152dd502b5b0437899)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3727eda8e8b285c94caba4bcd21d12f5cbfa8bcdb00091f849d9591455e5384eaf3474556bdb3a80efc91bc41d29f403561f1e5ba976d7a3)
Eric Trump

[CONTRIBUTE $5 = $10](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=3727eda8e8b285c9cdf4d7a7bc17fa45b88669775d19d0ff3d6118cc36205b3a16694c8edbfa18b6a407ab3c9e075776892c6f9250d68603)

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Senator McCaskill knows it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate[Click here to unsubscribe
body:
I support requiring insurance companies to cover all pre-existing conditions, and Senator McCaskill knows it. Hello Peter,

Among the concerns facing Missouri families, perhaps one of the most important is the issue of pre-existing conditions. I know the worry firsthand, because my son has a pre-existing condition. [ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=38c2bd4e991643e7a61940dc660406f0&_e=DWeeoDfIkvCLCgF5nM-2ltaJBznFemkSZtfIJMAGGSlcRYIvN_fgFn_p2fsdamxb_5AMkeyPqvoqEL5KSrEZ25Dcbh5BVbkGzAmmpuYfsa9KFKh-6FGU-170BzoPvF6rChyVXtvn6O_RvM3HuiUlpgV8_wkc9mhOkAM7u7Oq94XTupqEZeZLDNtAGSI4tYDEQfjW4-4OXczQzWsF8MI164xrnBNoIax-tZF2ymcju61_alcLjdUll9O-CxqqJVyXMfW0tW3aSkTeMb6sFyIf9UzZ5QcoPLUmDXb1sLiW0zecHcQhbmF7QDN85bsxssYFzW0p0DKoI6kKejE2t4fUTY7bbuOIN5utEi8uswmZ2E3aPJa8bLIpp7R_pKjfZpHu0be-E9VRXOnqpdxsXMaDyg%3D%3D) [ WATCH THE VIDEO TO LEARN MORE ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=38c2bd4e991643e7a61940dc660406f0&_e=DWeeoDfIkvCLCgF5nM-2ltaJBznFemkSZtfIJMAGGSlcRYIvN_fgFn_p2fsdamxb_5AMkeyPqvoqEL5KSrEZ25Dcbh5BVbkGzAmmpuYfsa9KFKh-6FGU-170BzoPvF6rChyVXtvn6O_RvM3HuiUlpgV8_wkc9mhOkAM7u7Oq94XTupqEZeZLDNtAGSI4tYDErQ_3jdf-UchDx9vilM2EXQDpgHHpIucNCW1JdGcFQLq6ueud9gNwq4yRL3_PiM__z6u1ttWbAAf-S8tCcGXzQEsHD8ND_WvOEzY_0pFEzVHHGdQ4j6lKOnfCAGltit97n9wC4en_Bu6ofbSF_-52o54PaOZUsKdAUCBEAe8vTC0g7quhG-hbSov5ucCnYT2NMNVRuloq2BBSRwQjL2zUiA%3D%3D) Like so many in Missouri, my family knows firsthand what it’s like to have a family member with a pre-existing condition. We understand the enormous stress of wondering whether they will always have access to the same level of care they do now.

That’s why I support requiring insurance companies to cover all pre-existing conditions, and Senator McCaskill knows it. That she would claim otherwise is not only wrong, _it’s insulting._

Missouri needs a Senator who is driven to fix our healthcare mess, something McCaskill has promised to do for a long time. If you want a Senator in Washington to will put solving problems above getting votes, I hope you will donate to Team Hawley today. [ STAND WITH JOSH - DONATE TODAY ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=38c2bd4e991643e7a61940dc660406f0&_e=DWeeoDfIkvCLCgF5nM-2ltaJBznFemkSZtfIJMAGGSlcRYIvN_fgFn_p2fsdamxb_5AMkeyPqvoqEL5KSrEZ25Dcbh5BVbkGzAmmpuYfsa9KFKh-6FGU-170BzoPvF6rChyVXtvn6O_RvM3HuiUlpgV8_wkc9mhOkAM7u7Oq94XTupqEZeZLDNtAGSI4tYDE3313DBiExXTTjofyBwDxq7IZsPtceJg5j8nfuk2Cd7Yp37mf3S7S837x7kOvGEoh7Boe_E5RdhkXKti1EdUWxIS-L0Gij6eOSo_mOTxjmN4IJmKDcf6n1bVwq8-1i79EnoeNr7Z42V25PvqEPaYKDIOQruwh-YSMdGfq4ixNSCldwgfD8MPjhlTNlclXYWAormhiaW6I9mIL-mzEqqj6Yw%3D%3D) For Missouri,Josh Hawley

body:

| | Peter, we're coming down to the wire before our FEC deadline. **We cannot miss goals and risk being forced to take our TV ads off the air.** But we're about to fall short of this critical goal. To stop that from happening, we're trying something new. [**We need to raise $26,000 by tomorrow at midnight to get back on track. We're launching our special $26 on the 26th match program.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe04/4462dc26/7b52f157/201ab8d2/3913296402/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180925am?refcode=sbe180925am_m") [**Give $5 -- it'll be _double-matched_**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe04/4462dc26/7b52f157/201ab8d1/3913296402/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180925am?refcode=sbe180925am_m&amount=5") [**Give $10 -- it'll be _triple-matched_**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe04/4462dc26/7b52f157/201ab8d0/3913296402/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180925am?refcode=sbe180925am_m&amount=10") [**Match our average online contribution of $26 -- it'll be _quadruple-matched!_**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe04/4462dc26/7b52f157/201ab8d7/3913296402/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180925am?refcode=sbe180925am_m&amount=26") New polling shows this is a single-digit race. President Trump, Vice President Pence, and the special interests all want me to lose my job. They're not just working to get rid of me. Republicans are determined to drag us backward, and dismantle the progress we've made. We don't fight the way they do. They are doing everything they can to defeat us with unlimited spending, vicious attacks, and lies. But we have something more powerful on our side, Peter: We fight back one average online contribution of $26 at a time. Peter, the stakes are higher than usual. This election is a tipping point, and we need to make sure it tips in our favor. [**Give what you can to help us reach $26,000 by midnight tomorrow. Depending on how much you give, it will be double, triple, or even quadruple-matched.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ffe04/4462dc26/7b52f157/201ab8d2/3913296402/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180925am?refcode=sbe180925am_m") And please know that I, along with everyone else here on Team Sherrod, very much appreciate whatever you can give. name: Dana Bye
subject: Did you see the new poll?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Two weeks ago, a poll of VA-7 found that our race was within the margin of error. Today, another survey of our race was released -- and it found that Team Spanberger is gaining ground.
| | Peter, Two weeks ago, we wrote you with the news that a poll of VA-7 found that our race was within the margin of error. Today, another survey of our race was released, this one from the reputable pollsters at Monmouth University -- _and they found that Team Spanberger is gaining ground._ **According to this new poll of likely voters,_our race is now a tie, 47 percent to 47 percent._** Peter, this race is a true toss-up, and we are counting on our grassroots supporters to help us take this impressive result and pull ahead. [**Will you make a donation today so we can earn the support of more undecided voters and turn this tied race into a win?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vSQ6Ewbkzn_ixBWyT-Ckxyvx3M9Cmv8QsEzVmKcJSK0=/lHHkPqJyzXU4g1Gk8cPe9PcJL07rQ3WHnkVfp76JoQU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.25_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) The topline result is itself encouraging -- and the details give us even more reason to be optimistic. There are still undecided voters to reach, and **this survey projects that Abigail would actually _lead_ Rep. Dave Brat** if turnout among Democrats surged above typical levels for a midterm election. This may be a historically Republican district -- but Abigail's message of positive change is resonating. With exactly 6 weeks to go until Election Day, it's now on us to tell more voters about Abigail and then get our supporters to the polls. [**Please make a donation today to help us make it happen.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vSQ6Ewbkzn_ixBWyT-Ckxyvx3M9Cmv8QsEzVmKcJSK0=/lHHkPqJyzXU4g1Gk8cPe9PcJL07rQ3WHnkVfp76JoQU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.25_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thanks, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/vSQ6Ewbkzn_ixBWyT-Ckxyvx3M9Cmv8QsEzVmKcJSK0=/lHHkPqJyzXU4g1Gk8cPe9PcJL07rQ3WHnkVfp76JoQU=?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.25_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/vSQ6Ewbkzn_ixBWyT-Ckxyvx3M9Cmv8QsEzVmKcJSK0=/lHHkPqJyzXU4g1Gk8cPe9PcJL07rQ3WHnkVfp76JoQU=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/vSQ6Ewbkzn_ixBWyT-Ckxyvx3M9Cmv8QsEzVmKcJSK0=/-suWehwyWJzBoL3A0PL81zrfz07ABT3sdjLpVFaSwjU=)_

subject: Early Voting Has Started
body:
You can already vote in person or by mail! |
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d2eeb3000f&e=19cebfe173) | [Share](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a990b782a0&e=19cebfe173)

---|---

---|---
| **You Can Vote Early**
Yes, believe it or not, **you can already vote** in person at your town clerk’s office, or by mail with an absentee ballot. **The Governor needs your support so he can continue his work to grow the economy and make Vermont more affordable.**

Please make your plan to vote today! **If you’d like to vote by mail, you can do so[by clicking here to request an absentee ballot. ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0bf113613d&e=19cebfe173)

And, with just 42 days until Election Day, we need your help to fuel us to the finish line. **Communicating the Governor’s vision of a more prosperous Vermont requires resources, and we fully expect our opponent and her allies to outspend us.

So, can the Governor **count** **on you to[chip in $25, $50, $100 or even $250](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=9a6fe2bd73&e=19cebfe173) to help us continue our work to build a more affordable Vermont?**

With your support, we're confident we will be successful in November.

Thank you,

Jason Maulucci
Deputy Campaign Manager

name: John Shimkus
subject: It only takes a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus
body:
Imagine this: you wake up on Election Day. You know you should vote, but you have to carve out the time to drive to the polls and wait in a long line.
[](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=60007e9309974bed8122771da13cb507&_e=cHDGvogO_yqX1mY1LmZc7ChJOaiJYGY9HA_M1fdhUKlHvaf-kDbCNvW-Owcpq2Mn3YaBKIeUbLmdToaAU3_lN_LtthebyoEDP_ZeAmkbXiS3xZZcFAI9zyX8_rCYZ-k-7YGbCEP0K4Id6EAjI3wxp7vvC3yiyODVGbZ_Z_um7cVg_Uzt-ofE6SUYiQA6vj6fKTJVxuiFKUZ9shwhCDU9oR9_6d0-gEsW3RIbwXMyFJYfbqnXc0laZ8VIkPLPX5tAaW1CdVIXtjeVe4IcW6X3uVOS1iSjP8-xXlG2GaP_v-N834HxGC1E4DNjzjZvVbfBVpBC5j6MxEm4sp7q_TMbmfPFmbzti35xKeUwEp3qWFFlovaHUlSJq17VISuwNYnhxmzaKF7Br2eIo4WWkyncYg%3D%3D)
Friend,

Imagine this: you wake up on Election Day. You know you should vote, but you have to carve out the time to drive to the polls and wait in a long line.

By taking a few moments out of your day today, you can skip the hassle on November 6.

Today, I’m inviting you to participate in our nation’s democratic system – all without leaving your home. It’s the easiest way to ensure your voice gets heard and it **_[only takes a minute to get signed up.](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=60007e9309974bed8122771da13cb507&_e=cHDGvogO_yqX1mY1LmZc7MEIRMdz7EVe6yKEXBDzI4mjJUpUWxad8jE46AcZF10XCvCjPeo6oynGKpPAkUqD9H3_empypk2mLhJt-sysKGi65lg7rYJwKuW9-qQMtQ0d5lbqQwQKz0R8o7-WKAn6ePqw_-vzWeV_c6UgPZXMHvZuau3lRpZIYNxDhaTw1c4o86j2n8C6kZ0WmKZ3ygiJWVUbo7xWhSwqriG2_vH3SdFcLUe5T0JBGRKA2b4mUvJaHCXLxbW6mAcDngqDXZAc15eCrGNNQg1O_mVGuDTnerkBroF76Ax33iC7Ae0inlgR6gs57ZOv_uvzQK4PicekvpHR6gP3ThhT8RDajL5Pfy3esWF5Mh9LOH2HodYCtsVYLDUISeuBruG8FbBdoyRr8A%3D%3D)_**

Just request your ballot, receive it in the mail, fill it out any time before November 1, and drop it back in the mail –**_[it’s that easy.](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=60007e9309974bed8122771da13cb507&_e=cHDGvogO_yqX1mY1LmZc7MEIRMdz7EVe6yKEXBDzI4mjJUpUWxad8jE46AcZF10XCvCjPeo6oynGKpPAkUqD9H3_empypk2mLhJt-sysKGi65lg7rYJwKuW9-qQMtQ0d5lbqQwQKz0R8o7-WKAn6ePqw_-vzWeV_c6UgPZXMHvZuau3lRpZIYNxDhaTw1c4odqdezhF_2XPoFnHpgfSJb5SwU4sbkrr4hP8XZ0_AP4ycnb_iAdUwcznecaa5TjDUnEQdywM04rUh85RJk-AN2Qm5PMQl26Hiitiejk8in8F-21LYl4A7UNbWKStRvyK9z-L0xffrNl-drFS8C6r3BDA8QIDvbARWF1uj2f6Dvbk0oaS1IHdi7jgi17vfo9ScJFRCPUinQUHhLkkRypNv1Q%3D%3D)_**

[Request your Vote by Mail Ballot](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=60007e9309974bed8122771da13cb507&_e=cHDGvogO_yqX1mY1LmZc7MEIRMdz7EVe6yKEXBDzI4mjJUpUWxad8jE46AcZF10XCvCjPeo6oynGKpPAkUqD9H3_empypk2mLhJt-sysKGi65lg7rYJwKuW9-qQMtQ0d5lbqQwQKz0R8o7-WKAn6ePqw_-vzWeV_c6UgPZXMHvZuau3lRpZIYNxDhaTw1c4oT_vmf4Q8zGeIwE4WI1sbq4NMobd1z6Q_yg3Tug5S7if-RF_9AjWlzftEMy8527GD97lbZj7drDfvHSnMGuGBRHJnIbbspvyspUhAVxpqVQRTO8Heu4rAxjcuX7a-kMjgdvm8Mxtqbbwz_o1a--z8L1Wflcz5cTle8EGQAcUwmhQ4VQXgL6CpOZddSfxynzW363_6skaPw1r0czylRRtz7w%3D%3D)
---

But that’s not the only way to get ahead! Registered voters in Illinois have the option to vote before Election Day by stopping by an Early Voting Center any time between October 22 and November 5.

[Find your Early Voting Center](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=60007e9309974bed8122771da13cb507&_e=cHDGvogO_yqX1mY1LmZc7MEIRMdz7EVe6yKEXBDzI4mjJUpUWxad8jE46AcZF10XCvCjPeo6oynGKpPAkUqD9H3_empypk2mLhJt-sysKGi65lg7rYJwKuW9-qQMtQ0d5lbqQwQKz0R8o7-WKAn6ePqw_-vzWeV_c6UgPZXMHvZuau3lRpZIYNxDhaTw1c4owUCiQsu5Anbm2fUUZjdhWRWdOUN0BWrxyzm4pcRI4MYssfaOb4RHZOv5iwaJ8bBdSirlsqfPeAUrFF33cytpXXOLz5p0Gat6gd_6IwbJ_-B84cMluQIh4UAQY2b8D9XYCyRlsYI-BilTIL6P2LrCUtAUC4SgLGrfx1PgX87nvHZG2zl0C9sV2Pmqt3KQ7hCIxSrMGtU1MMndnJKSmCbliA%3D%3D)
---

Friend, this election will be an incredibly important one for Illinois. From the top of the ballot to the bottom, our state is in desperate need of leaders committed to conservative values and principles.

By voting early, you’ll get a head start on supporting the leadership we need in Illinois. **_[Find out more here.](http://links.johnshimkus.com/u/click?_t=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_m=60007e9309974bed8122771da13cb507&_e=cHDGvogO_yqX1mY1LmZc7MEIRMdz7EVe6yKEXBDzI4mjJUpUWxad8jE46AcZF10XCvCjPeo6oynGKpPAkUqD9H3_empypk2mLhJt-sysKGi65lg7rYJwKuW9-qQMtQ0d5lbqQwQKz0R8o7-WKAn6ePqw_-vzWeV_c6UgPZXMHvZuau3lRpZIYNxDhaTw1c4ooNYr_TxmP3d6DT5_EcL4-H4_a7uGwLAIlII7QhoAl2Dbq2k_cSriKlpXfgWyGfYynvxdtyAq1wQAbGq1zWdHtS0aXTcSk7ml03sK0zlvmgiyQm3EK0qwYCQhoSS8ycJE41_-ymmumA4Azlqk_Y19oeY2h1ywozWATmJ9duDnKf7F9QIwlxvNJ-felrT9U2NmgXKE8epFWpuwaLmP_mOagg%3D%3D)_**

Sincerely,

John

Paid for by Volunteers for Shimkus.
---
[Unsubscribe](http://links.johnshimkus.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=eae2f3fb948c4b7f93f466c2a8ab140b&_s=60007e9309974bed8122771da13cb507&_t=vn3aug_JpSmJsyLf8lUf2rYRxovs_pdeX84UjkmNtPAMVxV4zMTqP0XlPnTFOIyCKXuKaATaL9DygX-GurBwDRa4nzjHeodwEpTtHf5s_ergUIycaYffUv2ppaazURph1eQ0Yekj1Ss3vM4V9EfpvvvhcFlsLIt563w4QvcNNKs%3D)

name: Tom O'Halleran
subject: building a blue wave in AZ-01
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
If you've read the news or spent time on social media recently, you may have heard something about a "blue wave." But we can't take anything for granted.
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633f15/1a8421e1/1a5d20cb8/492947d9/236072706/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Friends, If you've read the news or spent time on social media recently, you may have heard something about a "blue wave" \-- a surge in grassroots enthusiasm that will power Democrats to victory in November, up and down the ballot and across the country. And there are many reasons to be optimistic about our chances in November. We are gaining momentum, according to public polls and our feedback from voters on the ground. But we can't take anything for granted, especially in races like mine. **I 've been named the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, and we can't count on a blue wave to arrive and save us in November -- _we must build it ourselves._** **[Friends, we will build a blue wave with support from grassroots Democrats like you. Can you make a donation today, to help me build a blue wave in Arizona's First District?](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.25_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** | [$10](http://action.tomohalleran. ---|---|---
[$100](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.25_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=") | [$250](http://action.tomohalleran. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.25_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

I sincerely appreciate your continued support in this race, friends. Your support has enabled my team to continue knocking doors, registering voters, and making phone calls -- all important steps to sharing our message and ensuring that a blue wave arrives on November 6th. We are up against far-right Super PACs trying to stop us, so these efforts really are critical.

With your help, we will win this race and we can take back the House. **There are exactly 6 weeks left until the election, and we have no time to waste,** [**so please make a donation today if you can.**](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.09.25_b1_tom_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Yours,

Tom

****[DONATE](http://action.tomohalleran. **_**Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please [click here](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranwq32018?refcode=footer-bio&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=").**_**
