clean_body: If you've read the news or spent time on social media recently, you may have heard something about a "blue wave." But we can't take anything for granted. Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first. "" Friends, If you've read the news or spent time on social media recently, you may have heard something about a "blue wave" \-- a surge in grassroots enthusiasm that will power Democrats to victory in November, up and down the ballot and across the country. And there are many reasons to be optimistic about our chances in November. We are gaining momentum, according to public polls and our feedback from voters on the ground. But we can't take anything for granted, especially in races like mine. I 've been named the most vulnerable Democrat in the House, and we can't count on a blue wave to arrive and save us in November -- we must build it ourselves. "=" | "=" | "=" | "=" ---|---|--- "=" | "=" | "=" I sincerely appreciate your continued support in this race, friends. Your support has enabled my team to continue knocking doors, registering voters, and making phone calls -- all important steps to sharing our message and ensuring that a blue wave arrives on November 6th. We are up against far-right Super PACs trying to stop us, so these efforts really are critical. With your help, we will win this race and we can take back the House. There are exactly 6 weeks left until the election, and we have no time to waste, "=" Yours, Tom ** "=" Representative Tom O 'Halleran represents Arizona's First Congressional District in the 115th Congress. As a former police officer, small businessman, and Arizona state legislator, Tom knows what it takes to bring people together and bring positive change to Arizona families. Tom is taking on the tough challenges in Congress by championing ethics reforms and putting problem solving ahead of politics. If you'd like to support Tom's campaign please "=". ** Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

clean_body: Derek, Democrat U.S. Senator Elizabeth Warren wants to direct Massachusetts Democrats and liberal activists up to New Hampshire to interfere with our elections. We must stand firm and fight back against this influx of out-of-state involvement. With your donation, the NHGOP will be able to send out mail, create and print campaign materials, and support our grassroots efforts to get Republicans to the polls in November. We can also use you on the ground this November as well. Sincerely, Ray ChadwickNHGOP Area Vice-Chair, Hillsborough County | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301

name: Keren Charles Dongo, Kaine Campaign Manager
subject: I'm writing to you as a Virginian, as a campaign manager for a major Senate race, as a Black woman, and more importantly as a mother to a young daughter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I'm taking the time to write you today to talk about some really important things, but before I do that, I want to say one thing: ----------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

I'm taking the time to write you today to talk about some really important things, but before I do that, I want to say one thing:

I'm writing to you as a Virginian, as a campaign manager for a major Senate race, as a Black woman, and more importantly as a mother to a young daughter. And while this isn't exactly face to face, I don't have to tell you how important (and rare!) true, neighborly interactions and conversations are today. So here's the deal: _I give you my word that when I write you these emails, it will all be authentic and real - from me to you._

**What I want to talk about today is what 's happening on the national stage regarding the Supreme Court. For me - and I'm sure for you, it's concerning. If Judge Kavanaugh is confirmed, there could be implications for women for generations to come. We cannot possibly know the _extent of these consequences._**

But our greatest defense for the future? Voting, talking to our family and neighbors and getting them to vote, and supporting candidates that can prevent things like this from happening again.

[So I'm asking you today to donate online and help me keep building a program that will let Tim continue to represent you in the Senate - and will elect House candidates in Virginia that are moms, veterans, national security experts, and new fresh faces for old problems. Will you follow this link and help us out?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a1/3e0906/704fafd3/3e366407/948084957/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180925_2_FR_KCD_Keren-EOQ-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+So+Irsquom+asking+you+today+to+donate+on&utm_campaign=20180925_2_FR_KCD_Keren-EOQ-LDND&source=20180925_2_FR_KCD_Keren-EOQ-LDND")

Derek, I told you I'd keep it real - and frankly, I need $71,000 more by the end of this "End of Quarter" fundraising push that goes until [Sunday.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a1/3e0906/704fafd3/3e366405/948084957/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180925_2_FR_KCD_Keren-EOQ-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Sunday&utm_campaign=20180925_2_FR_KCD_Keren-EOQ-LDND&source=20180925_2_FR_KCD_Keren-EOQ-LDND") That money will go toward **talking to voters** and getting neighbors and friends empowered to go make a difference.

**I 'm going to steer this ship all the way to Election Day no matter what - but it's a huge help to have more people on board:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a1/3e0906/704fafd3/3e36641b/948084957/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180925_2_FR_KCD_Keren-EOQ-LDND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+5&utm_campaign=20180925_2_FR_KCD_Keren-EOQ-LDND&source=20180925_2_FR_KCD_Keren-EOQ-LDND")

clean_body: I'm taking the time to write you today to talk about some really important things, but before I do that, I want to say one thing: ---------------------------------------------------------------------- | | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek, I'm taking the time to write you today to talk about some really important things, but before I do that, I want to say one thing: I'm writing to you as a Virginian, as a campaign manager for a major Senate race, as a Black woman, and more importantly as a mother to a young daughter. And while this isn't exactly face to face, I don't have to tell you how important (and rare!) true, neighborly interactions and conversations are today. So here's the deal: I give you my word that when I write you these emails, it will all be authentic and real - from me to you. What I want to talk about today is what 's happening on the national stage regarding the Supreme Court. For me - and I'm sure for you, it's concerning. If Judge Kavanaugh is confirmed, there could be implications for women for generations to come. We cannot possibly know the extent of these consequences. But our greatest defense for the future? Voting, talking to our family and neighbors and getting them to vote, and supporting candidates that can prevent things like this from happening again. "" Derek, I told you I'd keep it real - and frankly, I need $71,000 more by the end of this "End of Quarter" fundraising push that goes until "" That money will go toward talking to voters and getting neighbors and friends empowered to go make a difference. I 'm going to steer this ship all the way to Election Day no matter what - but it's a huge help to have more people on board: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" On to November, Keren Charles Dongo Campaign Manager, Kaine for Virginia "" * | "" "" ""

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: I have some great news:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
And we're running out of time. We need to raise $100,000 by Sunday so we can get our ads out on TV, the radio, and online. |
---

| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d46/7377f838/386b20ed/51f8d344/748439932/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sept-eoq-match?refcode=20180925.2&amount=20")
---
Peter,

Thanks for taking the time to open my emails. With the experts saying **this race is a toss-up** , it's good to know our message is getting out there.

But not everybody gets these emails. Not everybody knows what I'm about. If we're going to win this race, we need our message to reach those folks, too. **That means every farmer. Every student. Every veteran._Every single Hoosier_.**

But we're running out of time. **We need to raise $100,000 by Sunday** so we can get our ads out on TV, the radio, and online.

**And I have some great news: Every dollar you chip in will go twice as far. Will you pitch in before Sunday's end-of-quarter deadline?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Express donate $50>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d46/7377f838/386b20ed/51f8d347/748439932/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sept-eoq-match?express_lane=true&refcode=20180925.2&amount=50")**
**[Express donate $100>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2d46/7377f838/386b20ed/51f8d347/748439932/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-sept-eoq-match?express_lane=true&refcode=20180925.2&amount=100")**

It's true that $100,000 is a lot to raise in just one week, but this is the FINAL end-of-quarter deadline of the whole campaign. We _need_ to hit this goal so we can run our ads in every corner of Indiana and guarantee that every Hoosier turns out to vote.

Joe

name: Team Ryan
subject: Check your voter registration >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Happy National Voter Registration Day! Are you registered to vote? How about your friends? | |
---
**It's National Voter Registration Day!** **[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe90d/2445292334/VEsH/ "https://voterlookup.sos.state.oh.us/voterlookup.aspx")** [Check your registration now ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe90d/2445292334/VEsE/ "https://voterlookup.sos.state.oh.us/voterlookup.aspx") Folks, Happy National Voter Registration Day! **Are you ready to vote?** \-- [Double-check your voter registration now, and make sure you're ready to make BIG CHANGE in November.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe90d/2445292334/VEsF/ "https://voterlookup.sos.state.oh.us/voterlookup.aspx") \-- [Not registered? Ohio has ONLINE VOTER REGISTRATION -- click here to get started.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe90c/2445292334/VEsC/ "https://olvr.sos.state.oh.us/") \-- [Want to vote by mail? Request an absentee ballot today.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe90f/2445292334/VEsD/ "https://www.sos.state.oh.us/elections/voters/absentee-voting/#gref") Here are helpful [Ohio voting deadlines](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe90e/2445292334/VEsA/ "https://www.sos.state.oh.us/elections/voters/voting-schedule/") to add to your calendar: • Tuesday, October 9, 2018: The deadline to register to vote in Ohio • Wednesday, October 10: Absentee voting by mail begins • Saturday, November 3: Deadline to request an absentee ballot at 12PM • Monday, November 5: Absentee ballot postmark deadline • Tuesday, November 6: Able to drop off absentee ballots at Board of Elections until 7:30PM **You don't have to wait until November 6 to vote!**[Here's the Ohio early in-person voting schedule:](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe90e/2445292334/VEsB/ "https://www.sos.state.oh.us/elections/voters/voting-schedule/") • Wednesday, October 10-Friday, October 12: 8AM-5PM • Monday, October 15-Friday, October 19, 8AM-5PM • Monday, October 22-Friday, October 26, 8AM-5PM • Saturday, October 27, 8AM-4PM • Monday, October 29-Wednesday, October 31, 8AM-7PM • Thursday, November 1-Friday, November 2, 8AM-7PM • Saturday, November 3, 8AM-4PM • Sunday, November 4, 1PM-5PM • Monday, November 5, 8AM-2PM And of course: ELECTION DAY, Tuesday, November 6, 2018. Polls are open in Ohio 6:30AM-7:30PM. **If we all reach out to at least three friends to make sure they're registered to vote and remind them of these key dates, it could make a huge difference in November.** Thank you so much! \-- Team Ryan [DONATE ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe931/2445292334/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr_sept18?refcode=em20180925_nvrd_footer")

* * *
Update Email Preferences [Receive Fewer Emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe930/2445292334/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [ Unsubscribe](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe933/2445292334/VEsHBQ/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe")
---
| |
---
# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |
---
**Tim Ryan for Congress**
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
[](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe932/2445292334/VEsHBA/ "http://facebook.com/timryanforcongress") [](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe935/2445292334/VEsHBw/ "https://twitter.com/TimRyan")
Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe934/2445292334/VEsHBg/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/update-your-information") Tim is one of the GOP's top targets in 2018, and big-money attacks from D.C. Republicans and right-wing special interests could come at any time. The only way we can make sure Tim remains in Congress to fight for working families is through the efforts of grassroots supporters, volunteers, and donors. That's why Tim needs your help. Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with Tim's top supporters. However, if you'd prefer to [receive fewer emails](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe930/2445292334/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timryanforcongress.com/page/signup/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"), please click the link. If you would like to be taken off the list entirely, you can also [unsubscribe.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a939c/5486deaa/2aa26285/dcfe933/2445292334/VEsHAA/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/unsubscribe") Usually no one reads this far, so good on you! From Tim and all of us at Team Ryan, thank you!

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: President Trump returns to the United Nations
body:
| |
---
The White House • September 25, 2018
## President Trump returns to the United Nations
**“Each of us here today is the emissary of a distinct culture,** a rich history, and a people bound together by ties of memory, tradition, and the values that make our homelands like nowhere else on Earth,” President Donald J. Trump said in a major speech at the 73rd Session of the United Nations General Assembly (UNGA) today. **“That is why America** [**will always choose independence**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzU2NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTM1NjUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwNzA3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1044610844582191104) and cooperation over global governance, control, and domination.” **Last year in New York,** President Trump outlined a vision at the U.N. of strong, sovereign nations working together to confront the biggest scourges facing Western civilization in the 21st century. He cited three threats in particular—North Korea, Iran, and ISIS—that required decisive action in the months ahead. **One year later** , bold American diplomacy has diminished each of these threats:
* The historic **Singapore Summit** with North Korean Chairman Kim Jong-Un marked the first-ever face-to-face meeting between a U.S. President and a North Korean head of state. At the summit, the two leaders committed to the complete denuclearization of the Korean peninsula. Just last week, leaders from North and South Korea and began drafting a plan to achieve that vision.
* When President Trump took office, ISIS represented one of the biggest threats to the world. By **changing the rules of engagement** on the ground, President Trump empowered U.S. commanders with broader authority to eradicate the terrorist network. That strategy paid dividends: With the help of our allies, all Iraqi territory has been liberated from ISIS control.
* On Iran, President Trump used last year’s UNGA speech to reiterate his profound **objections to a nuclear deal** that put the interests of diplomats ahead of the Iranian people—and, indeed, peaceful people the world over. In May, the President made good on his promise to withdraw America from that deal, reimposing sanctions to deter Tehran’s malign activities.

**Embracing[“peace through strength,”](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzU2NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTM1NjUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwNzA3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trumps-america-first-agenda-helping-achieve-peace-strength/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **President Trump has presided over a remarkable year in American foreign policy. Today in New York, he built on last year’s message to world leaders, making it clear that the work is only just beginning. **“Sovereign and independent nations** are the only vehicle where freedom has ever survived, democracy has ever endured, or peace has ever prospered,” President Trump said. “So together, let us choose a future of patriotism, prosperity, and pride. Let us choose peace and freedom over domination and defeat. And let us come here to this place to stand for our people and their nations.” [**President Trump returns to the U.N.—with new evidence for ‘peace through strength’**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzU2NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTM1NjUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwNzA3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/president-trump-returns-u-n-mountain-evidence-peace-strength/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Watch** : [**The President’s full address to the 73rd U.N. General Assembly session**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzU2NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTM1NjUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwNzA3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q6XXNWC5Koc)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian
**President Donald J. Trump addresses the 73rd Session of the United Nations General Assembly** | September 25, 2018
[Privacy Policy](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzU2NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTM1NjUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwNzA3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/privacy-policy/) | [Contact the White House](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzU2NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTM1NjUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwNzA3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/contact) | [Unsubscribe](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwOTI1Ljk1MzU2NTMxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDkyNS45NTM1NjUzMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzkwNzA3JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&106&&&https://messages.whitehouse.gov/accounts/USWH/subscriber/unsubscribe_from_topic?verification=5.de26655797f4bb6f464a5bb6e5436a0f&destination=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&topic_id=USWH_1)

name: Jerusalem Demsas
subject: Don't boo, vote!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
This'll just take a second.

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378074/7ab0e2c4/7e344554/3498d26a/756273856/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com/") Friend -- it's almost Halloween, and it's almost Election Day. Not to put too fine a point on it, but the whole "Don't boo, vote!" message that President Obama shared in 2016 is really resonating with me. Today is National Voter Registration Day, so no better time to remind you that come November, we can't afford any boos from the sidelines -- we need people lined up at their polling places to vote for Ben. [**So take a couple minutes and register to vote right now -- even if you aren't in Maryland, I guarantee there's a Democrat who needs your vote where you are. Register now!**](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378074/7ab0e2c4/7e344554/3498d26a/756273856/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/") Don't put this off, because many states don't allow for same-day registration on Election Day. It's something we should definitely fix, but we can only do it if we elect more Democrats like Ben who want to make it easier to vote. Keep it spooky 'til then, Jerusalem Jerusalem Demsas
Communications Director
Ben Jealous for Governor | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c378074/7ab0e2c4/7e344554/3498d255/756273856/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ09258B")

name: Chris Sloan, Steve Sisolak for Governor
subject: Falling short
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/v0tutVBJcuASdU2FI-45GZVW6xAe4VRdvkL8iWAxBg4=/Cd2ZDySAwUVTK0i5RADOmOUen7B8lSoDoiZzMaSUpIQ=?gpsid=37_57_3886&refcode=em18_180925_EOQ1_LG_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180925_EOQ1_LG_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---

Friend,

I'll get right to it: **we need to raise $50,000 before midnight on September 30** \-- our last filing deadline of the cycle -- our last chance to show everyone that Steve is the right man for the job.

Falling short of this goal is just not an option if we want to pull off a historic victory for this state and this country. Whether we reach this goal will determine where our campaign is able to spend critical resources in the final few weeks before Election Day. Whether we'll be able to compete in all 17 counties.

**[To be blunt: We need your help. And we need it now, team. Can you rush in $5 or more immediately?](https://act.myngp.com/el/v0tutVBJcuASdU2FI-45GZVW6xAe4VRdvkL8iWAxBg4=/Cd2ZDySAwUVTK0i5RADOmOUen7B8lSoDoiZzMaSUpIQ=?gpsid=37_57_3886&refcode=em18_180925_EOQ1_L1_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180925_EOQ1_L1_fnd_gq_act__CS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

name: Jay Inslee
subject: States of Progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We're working to build our progressive movement. Can you help?

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7be51/2f5ea88d/75656fd3/2cbc79c8/1967061518/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-25_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-09-25_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema") Friend, While President Trump rails against our democratic institutions and attacks our freedoms, Democratic governors are on the frontline fighting to protect the progress we've made. That's why I'm so proud to lead our movement as the chair of the Democratic Governors Association. In 2018, we have the strongest bench of Democratic candidates running for governor ever. **Twelve of our candidates are women,** contesting governor's seats from Maine to Kansas, Michigan to Idaho and Oregon. **Stacey Abrams could make history in Georgia as the first black female governor, Andrew Gillum the first black governor of Florida, Ben Jealous of Maryland the former chair of the NAACP, and Lupe Valdez the first openly gay Latina governor of Texas**. _Our movement in 2018 is as diverse and as strong as the country we love._ Friend, we need leaders like these across the country who will support and fight for our values. [**I'm asking you to join me in this fight. The work you and I do together right now will help stem the chaos left behind by the other Washington. Can you pitch in to help?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7be51/2f5ea88d/75656fd3/2cbc79c8/1967061518/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-25_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-09-25_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema") [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7be51/2f5ea88d/75656fd3/2cbc79c8/1967061518/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-25_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-09-25_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema") | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7be51/2f5ea88d/75656fd3/2cbc79c8/1967061518/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-25_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-09-25_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema")
---
I wish I could introduce you _personally_ to **Jared Polis** in Colorado, **Christine Hallquist** of Vermont, and **Governor** **Kate Brown** of Oregon, who are**proud representatives of the LGBT community.** And, I wish you could meet my friend **Billie Sutton, paralyzed in a rodeo accident,** who is in place to become South Dakota's next governor.
Here at home and across the country, I'm working hard to ensure we can continue standing up to Donald Trump's attacks on our progressive values. [**Will you join me in fighting back against the chaos of the other Washington and help us build this progressive movement?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7be51/2f5ea88d/75656fd3/2cbc79c8/1967061518/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-25_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-09-25_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd7be51/2f5ea88d/75656fd3/2cbc79c8/1967061518/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ji-eom?utm_source=ema_2018-09-25_eom-1&refcode=ema_2018-09-25_eom-1&utm_campaign=eom-1&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: What happens if you stay at home?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
Our country's largest voting bloc during the 2016 elections - more than 100 million Americans - was made up of voters who chose to stay at home and not vote.
#
Friends,
Are you registered to vote, or have you changed addresses since the last election? **There are only six weeks until Tuesday, November 6th -- we need to make sure _everyone_ is able to cast their ballot in this critical election.**
Nearly _10 million votes_ have been cast for Our Revolution candidates so far this year -- votes for candidates like Ben Jealous, Stacey Abrams, Andrew Gillum, and Paulette Jordan in gubernatorial races, and for two dozen candidates for Congress. This National Voter Registration Day, it's our job to make sure we can exercise our right and elect them in November.
**[Confirm your registration status now. It's the single most important thing you can do before voting begins in just a few weeks.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a92d/bed43eb/720a34ae/75fcc9c3/1142031582/VEsH/ "https://iwillvote.com/")**
Over 600 Our Revolution local groups are organizing meetings, knocking on doors, making phone calls and sending texts. It's not just to support over 100 of our endorsed candidates. **In Florida, we 're organizing to pass Amendment 4 to restore voting rights to 1.5 MILLION people who have had that right stripped away.**
Democracy means that everyone has a say in how our government is run. Generations have fought -- and died -- for the right to vote. The Supreme Court and states across the country are dismantling the Voting Rights Act and all that it protects, but we can begin to turn it around right now.
**[Check your voter registration status. Even if you haven't moved, confirming your registration is critical to ensure you can cast your ballot.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a92d/bed43eb/720a34ae/75fcc9c3/1142031582/VEsE/ "https://iwillvote.com/")**
When voter turnout is high, the political revolution will prevail. Thank you for doing your part to make it possible.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution
**[P.S. -- If you can afford to, pitch in $5 to help us get out the vote over the next six weeks. This election is a turning point -- let's take the progressive momentum in this election and translate it into victories across the country.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a92d/bed43eb/720a34ae/75fcc9c2/1142031582/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-gotv18?refcode=em180925-b")**

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution's general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.
PO Box 66208, Washington, DC 20035
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a92d/bed43eb/720a34ae/75fcc9cd/1142031582/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/information-update?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a92d/bed43eb/720a34ae/75fcc9cc/1142031582/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMTIzIn0=/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/OR-fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=22123"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a92d/bed43eb/720a34ae/75fcc9cf/1142031582/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Help us continue transforming American politics and fighting for progressive candidates and causes by [contributing to Our Revolution here](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a92d/bed43eb/720a34ae/75fcc9ce/1142031582/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ourrevolution?refcode=email-footer-OR").

name: Bob Corney, Team Bredesen
subject: Did you see Phil in tonight’s debate?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bredesen for Senate
body:
|
#
Peter -- Phil Bredesen just got off the stage at the first debate, and he couldn’t have made it any more clear why he’s applying to be Tennessee’s next United States Senator. Tonight’s debate was a lot like this race. While Congresswoman Marsha Blackburn did everything she could to drag the debate into the muck and mud of partisan politics, Governor Bredesen kept the conversation focused on the real issues that matter to Tennesseans. The contrast is clear -- and Governor Bredesen’s message of _working together to get things done_ is resonating with Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. But polls are showing a tighter and tighter race, and dark money groups funded by Washington special interests are spending millions of dollars on false attack ads trying to tear down Governor Bredesen. **With our final end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline just days away, we’re going to need your help to tune out the partisan noise and set the record straight. clean_body: | Peter -- Phil Bredesen just got off the stage at the first debate, and he couldn’t have made it any more clear why he’s applying to be Tennessee’s next United States Senator. Tonight’s debate was a lot like this race. While Congresswoman Marsha Blackburn did everything she could to drag the debate into the muck and mud of partisan politics, Governor Bredesen kept the conversation focused on the real issues that matter to Tennesseans. The contrast is clear -- and Governor Bredesen’s message of working together to get things done is resonating with Democrats, Republicans, and Independents alike. But polls are showing a tighter and tighter race, and dark money groups funded by Washington special interests are spending millions of dollars on false attack ads trying to tear down Governor Bredesen. With our final end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline just days away, we’re going to need your help to tune out the partisan noise and set the record straight. Can you chip in $10 or more right now to help us finish strong in the last weeks of this campaign? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = If we keep coming together and taking action in the final days of this campaign, I know we can stay focused and win this thing. Thanks for your help, Bob Corney Campaign Manager Bredesen for Senate Paid for by Bredesen for Senate Bredesen for Senate P.O. Box 92010 Nashville, TN 37209 United States

name: Team Casey
subject: we can't afford to lose
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6241/51dbcc2a/13649edb/3abb175/329667907/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/")
It's no secret that the Trump administration has made a corrupt bargain with far-right special interests to put the wealthiest 1% and corporations ahead of working families. Repeatedly, members of the GOP have refused to stand up to the most toxic policies coming from the Trump White House.

It has never been more important to make sure Pennsylvanians have a fighter in the Senate. Bob is running against someone who votes with the president over _99% of the time_ and has repeatedly said he's running to give Trump another yes vote in the Senate, so we have to do everything we can to make sure Bob wins this year.

**_[There's too much on the line -- can you chip in $5 or whatever you can right now to help protect Bob?](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180925_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")_** [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180925_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500") The only way to put a stop to the most dangerous pieces of legislation coming out the Trump White House is to make sure we re-elect firewalls like Bob this year. He's not afraid to fight for Pennsylvania with both fists up, and he'll keep fighting, but he has a big fundraising deadline at the end of the week, and he needs your help to raise the money to finish this campaign strong.

**_[Bob's fighting for Social Security, Medicaid, Medicare and so much more this year. What can you give to help him keep fighting for PA?](https://secure.bobcasey. Team Casey

[DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180925_fr2_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: Over the next 42 days:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The key to victory is...

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180925_em&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friends, Minnesota is one of the biggest Senate races in the country, and my friend Tina Smith is facing a tough challenge over the next 42 days to win this race. **She 's facing Republican special interests, a self-funding opponent, and a White House "enthralled with the idea of flipping Minnesota" red according to the _Washington Post_.** I was on the ground in Minnesota with Tina and one of the keys to her victory and taking all of this on is grassroots supporters like you. **[So I have to ask you now, friend, can you pitch in $3 before her big end-of-quarter deadline in 4 days? Grassroots contributions will be the difference in this race so every dollar will matter.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180925_em&amount=3&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180925_em&amount=3&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** Donald Trump came within 1.5 points of winning Minnesota in 2016, and polls show this race tightening in the single digits. We can't take anything for granted here. _And_ you and I know the best way to put a stop to Donald Trump's agenda is for Democrats to take back the Senate -- that can't happen without Tina winning this November. **[I just want to ask you one more time -- will you dig deep for Tina and pitch in? She's counting on you to hit her goal before midnight on September 30.](https://action.tinaforminnesota. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-september?refcode=rtw_20180925_em&amount=3&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=55783&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Sturgeon Lake&state=MN&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _¡ La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues! Catherine Cortez Masto
U.S. Senator for Nevada
---

name: Scholten4Iowa
subject: A Most Important Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
**Today is a day that could change the course of the November elections.**
Today is National Voter Registration Day, a day to commit to vote in the 2018 election, which starts with registering to vote or checking that your registration is up to date. It only takes a couple of minutes and you can do this by clicking on the image below:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2332520/12756648/-1612268846?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmExYjZjNS0yOGMxLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JwR8fNu0zreWBtWtF1loV71ej-W378MBg9MyzRQa1uE=)
**Have questions about voting?** Call the voter hotline at 833-336-VOTE.
**Already registered to vote?** Forward this email to friends to encourage them to vote!
Then, **take the next step to improve our democracy, by helping us rid Congress of Steve King** , who has done nothing to represent the people of this district. [**_Click here to donate to J.D. Scholten, who will actually represent us by bringing Iowa values to Washington D.C.!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2332521/12756649/15907320?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmExYjZjNS0yOGMxLWU4MTEtYWYxMS0yODE4Nzg0N2M4OWUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JwR8fNu0zreWBtWtF1loV71ej-W378MBg9MyzRQa1uE=)
Thank you.
Standing Tall for All,
Team Scholten

name: Alex Meyer - Political
subject: Following Up - Josh Hawley Campaign
body:
**Thank you for signing up to volunteer!** Hey there Peter! My name is Alex Meyer and I am the State Director for the RNC here in Missouri - we are working alongside Josh Hawley's campaign. Just sending you a quick note because I saw you signed up and wanted to make sure someone has already reached out to you - If they haven't please let me know and I will get you connected right now. Or take a look at our offices and contacts below and contact them directly, if that is easier for you. Or if you are wanting a yard sign please drop on by and pick one up - please email someone from the team first if you are going to drop by so we have a sign ready and reserved for you! Either way, _**THANK YOU**_ for singing up to volunteer to be apart of this incredibly important campaign!!
**ST. LOUIS - SOUTH****Address:** 4407-H Meramec Bottom Rd, St. Louis, MO 63129
**Contact:** Jon George <jgeorge@mogop.org>
**ST. CHARLES****Address:** 3551 Veterans Memorial Parkway St.Charles, MO 63303
Contact:Austin Schwerdt <aschwerdt@mogop.org>
**COLUMBIA****Address:** 1123 Wilkes BlvdSuite 220Columbia MO 65201
**Contact:** Spencer Bone<sbone@mogop.org>
**SPRINGFIELD****Address:** 2636 S Glenstone AveSpringfield, MO
**Contact:** Cristian Antal <cantal@mogop.org>
**JOPLIN****Address:** 2640 E 32nd StJoplin, MO
**Contact:** Will Wheeler <wwheeler@mogop.org>
**ST. JOSEPH****Address:** 3821 Frederick AveSt Joseph MO 64506
**Contact:** Payton Englert <penglert@mogop.org>
**ST. LOUIS - WEST****Address:** 14538 Manchester Rd. Suite 201 Winchester MO 63011
**Contact:** Jon George <jgeorge@mogop.org>
**KIRKSVILLE****Address:** 113 E. Washington St. Suite 2. Kirksville, MO 63501 **Contact:** Shane Loewenstein <sloewenstein@mogop.org>
**KANSAS CITY****Address:** 706 NW State Route 7, Blue Springs, MO 64014, United States **Contact:** Andy Bakker <abakker@mogop.org>
**JEFFERSON COUNTY****Address:** 1242 Main StreetImperial, MO 63052 **Contact:** Nick Riffel<nriffel@mogop.org>
**ROLLA****Address:** 825 South Bishop AveRolla, MO **Contact:** Brett Adams <badams@mogop.org>

Can you imagine Tammy Baldwin elected to another term in office... FOR SIX MORE YEARS? The progress we’ve made in Wisconsin – and America – could.....
Friend,

6 years. It’s a long time.

It’s also the length of a U.S. Senate term.

Can you imagine Tammy Baldwin elected to another term in office... FOR SIX MORE YEARS?

The progress we’ve made in Wisconsin – and America – could be entirely undone. Our thriving economy could crumble, our tax cuts could disappear...

The plain truth is, we can’t afford six more years of Tammy Baldwin. That’s why I set up a DEFEAT TAMMY FUND, to make sure the next few months are the last in Wisconsin history with a “Senator Baldwin.”
[CHIP IN: DEFEAT TAMMY FUND](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c21fe83923484ae7956edca22f9ef75a&_e=FgITPpDxZIeCiHDkT4-ueg5wq4zlsX2kwhsQR0V8TYRUylql04bpG9WxbxtdDJSA-irEBQQ9-kPoeVxEMdWvuaz80E6Sp5lgVp__r-pc8YlFsOwfJHt3OTvYjuw89wB6AcHFjDD3h3de5psw0Aua6j6rXR4XrfwxxWzWXCHQ3vC9N2h2s0HyjfWkqUQKLeAmjJpO0X_DrmgEaX6am0PJyYDdSe3X5V5wAGE2W7b_iXTmxl5ZiyP2HgqEy4ORv1JMkvxkdwHGb5Qnu-dl61-jIZemaFHbWBFLyMIzNx6zlIl9kMjgj4Ueq5PNoG_MxxVb9B0fJML8vMF0vKokeWLiveJsxEDi7wnlCAy1uCYTKWhLpo0vTPMGvoUisoA0HThpocYD7RUOKIcMjWq1wpMqEVqKqIFcP9cydedZqXUZKUs%3D)

[**Friend, I’m ready to make things happen by supporting the America First agenda, but I need you first.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c21fe83923484ae7956edca22f9ef75a&_e=FgITPpDxZIeCiHDkT4-ueg5wq4zlsX2kwhsQR0V8TYRUylql04bpG9WxbxtdDJSA-irEBQQ9-kPoeVxEMdWvuaz80E6Sp5lgVp__r-pc8YlFsOwfJHt3OTvYjuw89wB6AcHFjDD3h3de5psw0Aua6j6rXR4XrfwxxWzWXCHQ3vC9N2h2s0HyjfWkqUQKLeAm1Nvh1Fn1gZt6ImScovss2hHJWb4EVoo_yU8FbFNaATN5Zkqv3J8Xe4Ge09innq4cAhW7DU5leQbWtuqfJAVJfg5JyjWZXW65KFbYEeHXRXb8hfXTPkLKL5RLGpIRfeWs3m-XOJ62lJFanfVPd6H5WmrHHohcheDGmEqDrPomfKiMO9jvhoiB6jzW0RKWE9S7ttGN_hztjZZZLZwCczltDInzrunr6yTZoT_PruNCOEQ%3D)

Leah

\-----Forwarded Message Below-----

Friend, make no mistake... we are the underdogs now.

The media and the leftist elites are going to count us out.

They are going to outspend us.

They are going to say we can’t win.

But friend, I’m no stranger to tough campaigns, and I’m no stranger to being labeled the underdog. Heck, as a working mom, I’ve spent my whole life as the underdog.

I know, if we work together, we WILL prevail.

Now, with the clock ticking down to the final days of this election cycle... I’m going ALL OUT and I need your help. I’ve set up a DEFEAT TAMMY FUND with a goal of raising $75,000 by September 30th. Friend, the people of Wisconsin voted to see an agenda that finally puts America first when we voted for President Trump last November.

But out-of-touch politicians like Tammy Baldwin choose to obstruct that agenda. She won’t vote for true border security and build the wall. She stands in the way of lowering health care costs and premiums. And friend, she didn’t even vote to let you keep an extra $1,600 of your hard-earned dollars through tax reform!

That is unacceptable. I know that if I get to Washington, I will make things happen by standing by the America First agenda we all believe in.

This goal of $75,000 dollars for the Defeat Tammy Fund will help us get our message out there and win the support of Wisconsin voters everywhere.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c21fe83923484ae7956edca22f9ef75a&_e=UZHeiD6wT68RIfrk-1mHXLQ751WVM1ZvMZYZ3G31jFYABc4tv4b6Y-qhPMFtaWHJzMMjIXwxAFdIIo6KkvddQffbOCb3oRjqotzNVnJw_rAR-eR9httMcF2eBPprve5chFFK2kvexeeOCoT6FIQWbyhPWLICicIM_e7pK3-yzdU83OaiMaeZc-dGdJulUKU9oDnfwk_GmyNCf1RZCP2f6vgx92FcM1ou2qWUAHGeabarCdvglDjKVEIeN3TIzgz3). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c21fe83923484ae7956edca22f9ef75a&_e=FgITPpDxZIeCiHDkT4-uerso5boTOkV5eHnSUfatyhGADSQZLwe0dH-E-hrJIUAKgWrFuKRinv0HJRRDmPYro1GY_YMC6Epfxks2QrTlGgcgVft-CVYmQ5898y12UjccFKnwMqu2rMTrZD3wC02mI0G08nM-0Nb3ywSsEJZXTAqn4HOcHXRs5evRUhilPr587JiO6pAVtkctmN_tluSqwWO2Hmp4ljenoTX7Dp1_5McKpMVJQeOGqBy5qGeo5nbDBHeeOUXRNHWc_vWPkC-f5scD_cNFV37xusxQ_z7E2mcQ3IdG9zk8LlOBy3oPxh8EDV5vCbDSBZOk-PnlvVKps0vhH7kGPJYl7OoeC6FZ9U3b3PZf73mrao8g3XQ1rbeZ) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c21fe83923484ae7956edca22f9ef75a&_e=FgITPpDxZIeCiHDkT4-uerso5boTOkV5eHnSUfatyhHj8ph7Yp41SrpjkuomfBfaW4XgTPu2nP9Roc-7bb_z_Ohp6lkqv7LtDLJ0BuFGM7y5LAB1BiwhJQM010iYbN_FRXU1X1SLzCorDUl65neQGwL8Cep0QPML_FM1uuQUrqDQsFiYeUZoKUJNuQUpvoyXaxTT4RTtu26Cut4B1qs0dupzuhLj6q2H0hcEsgZ3LiDEpa4K8Ypel7fw-tLJ3OovY157g1JU4QRz5wzFspK3yWRivkcRlNhhK1E8knKwj0n5R0lYNoId7xNVokLimxd1Kqb8WXvZgYJ-LRF_oTBuRw-mz_4eZGaTJ5p9f7531OP8nKSCBTMHCNQ3L06C8LhS) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c21fe83923484ae7956edca22f9ef75a&_e=FgITPpDxZIeCiHDkT4-uej_HFf02HLvN8RSUOR8LpZZtg4Jfq9j4VOSGhZVikRIlqJJiq2RK3B44s9QUFLfmVvr8rFgg9TkUoEpzFSpNUX7EhlP9-wezmNwG315ytcV9TgLlpMm0XtOcHAdKlWpmjgMfrb97rXG5CJL5xf6_eR_mt7P0lB_3qhb_PquN3N8hhkIzS8NN_o2yrfOfM8ozLa5hUC7GGwquV_3NjfpJlaGQx83mhRoEOU6YxFcKJ5z7aN2X3jGDvQdFvo07w5u91g%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c21fe83923484ae7956edca22f9ef75a&_e=FgITPpDxZIeCiHDkT4-ueuAChHY7UveP-CKBOGNhfJ-HhN_xUJtrIwlrOCOe82vcDaY6VCczxaN41Qn_qUGjrv1pU97rZU3AxkeIah9LJmGcX_enhja6kxULKuEiSUjDfu22LIdLoDnNETjOAdm_xS2uovphsQfMRByoP8YpPHO2f-lLAmRmFND42E42tNf-mGcT8M_cgWjuyRdceoj1B1zAPyKLFjf5Cs3jIjSkEaAUn_NU0m4BrBeQXcIDoNhLl6_nt7ewW7exDQCBepAKPQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c21fe83923484ae7956edca22f9ef75a&_e=FgITPpDxZIeCiHDkT4-ueigvhkv_zFMV0_fIoa2l-66M-oDQ2V-lf4pIzmO6HjwhZwvdEWV0z6_4dSM16c2nAq4i-wCGszictuHoMRw8Gsk03CJjAtRAN2VD85FMePFbbmaiq_c1NdSqxwv_VGDt6m9qyqsX69wkL6iQVKWLxb7LzQYflQo4-oY-mmCT24HSs9y8tMSDk_B9KWDKBwNHb_PYwzk6DgZYIOlQUrhBYBo_uoPH6ah1YWETtHzu5Hg4Iuff64CNgVp16QjCLhEuJw%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c21fe83923484ae7956edca22f9ef75a&_e=FgITPpDxZIeCiHDkT4-uerso5boTOkV5eHnSUfatyhHCV8CYQXcJoa3_QZTGy6QqrrAuQqI0TvrbRhFVUsQZwbKC_7Rrt6y59N51MIrvTX2IPOwv6jzCdZOMyL9zlXX7EctfowaKyJFnW0T3OP_8BVsuOUjGIBNUB_8RuPuz52ekXPfaLFp_EDNxzPtH6y-8NFa8UJMYHGcvBf2698i9rFC_9s6gp4JxZSQ1K9A-KDi1EXFAyrYe-JF1VPVLrBijh6-9IQ6_A6_xVhonYw18TvuJJgxkIwLFixHKSLERj76Dcok7sGvI6EDCDh_7jmXZOzgf-7_qmafKUDpalzq-RlBuMJSymT9xtYBAtRRxklYThVF0N-TI9lTDCGYphTbW7ih13AxccfmhEopsaiojOQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. Click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c21fe83923484ae7956edca22f9ef75a&_e=UZHeiD6wT68RIfrk-1mHXLQ751WVM1ZvMZYZ3G31jFYABc4tv4b6Y-qhPMFtaWHJzMMjIXwxAFdIIo6KkvddQffbOCb3oRjqotzNVnJw_rAR-eR9httMcF2eBPprve5chFFK2kvexeeOCoT6FIQWbyhPWLICicIM_e7pK3-yzdU83OaiMaeZc-dGdJulUKU9oDnfwk_GmyNCf1RZCP2f6vgx92FcM1ou2qWUAHGeabarCdvglDjKVEIeN3TIzgz3) to choose which updates you’d like to get, and click [here](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=c21fe83923484ae7956edca22f9ef75a&_e=UZHeiD6wT68RIfrk-1mHXLQ751WVM1ZvMZYZ3G31jFYABc4tv4b6Y-qhPMFtaWHJzMMjIXwxAFdIIo6KkvddQffbOCb3oRjqotzNVnJw_rAR-eR9httMcF2eBPprve5chFFK2kvexeeOCoT6FIQWbyhPWLICicIM_e7pK3-yzdU83OaiMaeZc-dGdJulUKU9oDnfwk_GmyNCf1RZCP2f6vgx92FcM1ou2qWUAHGeabarCdvglDjKVEIeN3TIzgz3) to unsubscribe. clean_body: Can you imagine Tammy Baldwin elected to another term in office... FOR SIX MORE YEARS? The progress we’ve made in Wisconsin – and America – could..... Friend, 6 years. It’s a long time. It’s also the length of a U.S. Senate term. Can you imagine Tammy Baldwin elected to another term in office... FOR SIX MORE YEARS? The progress we’ve made in Wisconsin – and America – could be entirely undone. Our thriving economy could crumble, our tax cuts could disappear... The plain truth is, we can’t afford six more years of Tammy Baldwin. That’s why I set up a DEFEAT TAMMY FUND, to make sure the next few months are the last in Wisconsin history with a “Senator Baldwin.” We’ve reached the most critical point of this election thus far. It’s our chance to make the maximum impact and REJECT Tammy Baldwin who looks out for herself more than Wisconsinites. The clock is ticking. We’re getting closer by the minute. It’s time to stand strong, together, and DEFEAT TAMMY. Leah \-----Forwarded Message Below----- Friend, make no mistake... we are the underdogs now. The media and the leftist elites are going to count us out. They are going to outspend us. They are going to say we can’t win. But friend, I’m no stranger to tough campaigns, and I’m no stranger to being labeled the underdog. Heck, as a working mom, I’ve spent my whole life as the underdog. I know, if we work together, we WILL prevail. Now, with the clock ticking down to the final days of this election cycle... I’m going ALL OUT and I need your help. I’ve set up a DEFEAT TAMMY FUND with a goal of raising $75,000 by September 30th. Friend, the people of Wisconsin voted to see an agenda that finally puts America first when we voted for President Trump last November. But out-of-touch politicians like Tammy Baldwin choose to obstruct that agenda. She won’t vote for true border security and build the wall. She stands in the way of lowering health care costs and premiums. And friend, she didn’t even vote to let you keep an extra $1,600 of your hard-earned dollars through tax reform! That is unacceptable. I know that if I get to Washington, I will make things happen by standing by the America First agenda we all believe in. This goal of $75,000 dollars for the Defeat Tammy Fund will help us get our message out there and win the support of Wisconsin voters everywhere. Let’s win this thing. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

I've got bad news, friends. **We had to pull down our very first TV ad - and now, we need to raise another $4,115 before midnight to get our ad back on the air, but we're falling way short.**
If we want to win in New Hampshire and defeat the Trump-Sununu agenda that's taking our state backward, we can't afford to fall short.
Here's the thing: I'm not taking any money from corporate special interests - but I still have to fight against the big money they're spending to defeat me.

body:
Many special interest donors will now have to be disclosed. [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_180925_DM_EM&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
Peter, this didn't get much coverage last week, but it's a very significant victory for electoral transparency: [](http://ca.voteforlinda. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-linda?refcode=RTW_180925_DM_EM&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&city=Ankeny&state=IA&zip=50023&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Starting immediately, advocacy groups (such as the Koch-funded Americans for Prosperity) who spend to influence elections will have to report the names of donors who give more than $200 a year.

This is an excellent ruling for our democracy, but there's a lot of work left to be done -- and that starts with electing candidates _this year_ who've demonstrated their commitment to getting dark money out of politics.

**[Linda is working hard to elect a slate of Democratic challengers in California who are strong champions of increasing campaign finance transparency and will work to repeal _Citizens United_. Will you help her raise $5,497 more by the September 30 FEC deadline?](http://ca.voteforlinda. name: TK 2018 | Ian Sams, Communications Director
subject: Kaine vs. Stewart - Debate tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, Tim Kaine heads back to the debate stage tomorrow. The stakes have been raised since Tim last faced his opponent. Polls have fluctuated, Senate Republicans have dominated the news, and President Trump has shown a willingness to jump into Senate races like ours on a dime.

**If you need a reminder of who exactly our opponent is, I 'll say this much:** He eats deceit for breakfast, and can always be counted on to deliver a pretty damn offensive tweet. (Sound like someone else you know?)

Anyway - I've been preparing with Tim all week and I know he's ready to take this on. But it's always nice when he has some grassroots support behind him. Right now, that support could really be used in the form of an online donation (we're right in the middle of our End-of-Quarter fundraising push). [Will you help cheer him on by throwing any spare change our way before tomorrow?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f11a3/3e0906/705f2a4b/3e366741/1081681379/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-q32018-september-eoq?refcode=20180925_3_FR_IS_debate-tmrw-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Will+you+help+cheer+him+on+by+throwing+a&utm_campaign=20180925_3_FR_IS_debate-tmrw-LDND&source=20180925_3_FR_IS_debate-tmrw-LDND")

**He has a major fundraising goal to hit before it becomes October and helping him fill that (now $61,000) gap is sure to put him in good spirits - and, of course, help him do the hard work it 'll take to elect Democrats. Right now, that support could really be used in the form of an online donation (we're right in the middle of our End-of-Quarter fundraising push). "" He has a major fundraising goal to hit before it becomes October and helping him fill that (now $61,000) gap is sure to put him in good spirits - and, of course, help him do the hard work it 'll take to elect Democrats.
